results.title: Bundesdatenschutzgesetz /Federal Data Protection Act (BDSG)
results.localTitle: 联邦数据保护法
results.referenceNo: BGBl. I S. 2097（即2017年《联邦法律公报》第 I 部第44号，第 2097 页）
results.issuer: 德国联邦议院（Deutscher Bundestag）和联邦参议院（Bundesrat）
results.summary: 德国《联邦数据保护法》（BDSG）是在 GDPR 框架下的配套与细化立法，主要在 GDPR 允许成员国自行规定的领域提供更具操作性的规则：一是对雇员数据处理作出专门规定（如以劳动关系必要性、集体协议为依据），成为企业人力资源合规的重要法律基础；二是细化科研、统计、档案目的处理的条件与保障措施；三是对信用评估与评分（scoring）设定更具体的合法性与透明度要求；四是通过限制条款在特定情形下限制数据主体权利（如为公共安全、执法、国家安全或保护商业秘密）；五是对视频监控在公共可进入场所的使用提出条件；六是规定数据保护官（DPO）任命门槛与地位（在德国实践中通常较 GDPR 更严格、适用更广）；并明确联邦与州监管机构的分工以及刑事与行政责任。整体上，BDSG 不替代 GDPR，而是在其框架内提供本地化、可操作的合规标准，部分领域对控制者提出了更具体或更严格的要求。
results.englishSummary: The German Federal Data Protection Act (BDSG) complements and specifies the GDPR by setting more operational rules in areas where Member States have discretion. It (i) provides a dedicated legal basis for employee data processing (e.g., necessity for employment purposes or collective agreements), which is central to HR compliance; (ii) details conditions and safeguards for processing for scientific research, statistics, and archiving; (iii) imposes more specific legality and transparency requirements for creditworthiness assessments and scoring; (iv) allows restrictions on data subject rights in defined cases (e.g., public security, law enforcement, national security, or protection of trade secrets); (v) sets conditions for video surveillance in publicly accessible areas; and (vi) defines DPO appointment thresholds and status, which in practice are often stricter and broader in Germany than the GDPR baseline. It also clarifies the allocation of powers among supervisory authorities and provides for criminal and administrative liability. Overall, the BDSG does not replace the GDPR but localizes it with practical compliance standards, sometimes imposing more specific or stricter obligations on controllers.

results.title: Förordning (2018:219) med kompletterande bestämmelser till EU:s dataskyddsförordning
results.localTitle: GDPR 补充条款法案的实施条例（SFS 2018:219）
results.summary: 该条例配套实施瑞典GDPR补充条款法案（SFS 2018:218），规定主管机关内部程序、案件处理和协作机制，从而细化GDPR在瑞典行政体系中的程序性适用规则。
results.englishSummary: This Ordinance complements the Act（（SFS 2018:218） Act by regulating internal procedures, case handling and coordination mechanisms of the supervisory authority, thereby refining the procedural application of the GDPR within the Swedish administrative system.

results.title: Transpõe a Diretiva (UE) 2022/2555, relativa a medidas destinadas a garantir um elevado nível comum de cibersegurança na União
results.localTitle: 将关于确保欧盟网络安全高水平共同性的措施的（EU）2022/2555 号指令转化为葡萄牙国内法
results.summary: 该法令转化实施 Directive (EU) 2022/2555（NIS2 指令），界定关键与重要实体范围、规定强制风险管理与报告时限，并赋予国家主管机关监督和处罚权，从而在部分领域设定更明确的技术与组织措施及罚款标准。
results.englishSummary: This Decree-Law transposes Directive (EU) 2022/2555 (NIS2 Directive) by defining essential and important entities, establishing mandatory risk management and reporting deadlines, and granting supervisory and sanctioning powers to national authorities, thereby setting clearer technical and organizational measures and fine levels in certain areas.

results.title: Ley Orgánica 3/2018, de 5 de diciembre, de Protección de Datos Personales y garantía de los derechos digitales.
results.localTitle: 第3/2018号皇家法令 《关于个人数据保护与数字权利保障组织法》汇编文本
results.issuer: 西班牙 共和国议会（Cortes Generales）
results.summary: 该法旨在使西班牙国内法与 欧盟《通用数据保护条例（GDPR, Regulation (EU) 2016/679）》 相一致，并补充 GDPR 未详尽规定的领域。该法确立个人数据处理的合法基础、信息提供义务、数据主体权利（访问、更正、删除、限制处理、数据可携权等），并规定监督机构 西班牙数据保护局（AEPD） 的职责与制裁程序；同时引入并规范一系列 数字权利（如互联网中立性、普遍网络接入、数字教育权、未成年人在线保护、数字断联权、网络信息修正权等），并对特定情境（如就业场景下的监控/地理定位处理、国际数据传输的事前授权与通知机制等）提出具体规定。与 GDPR 相比，该法在允许成员国制定更详细规则的方面提供了更具体的国内规范和操作性细则，尤其在数字权利保障、未成年人数据处理条件、雇佣关系中数据保护、国际数据转移授权机制以及监督和制裁程序方面进行了扩展和细化。
results.englishSummary: The Law is designed to align Spain’s domestic legal framework with the GDPR，while also addressing areas not fully covered by the GDPR. The law establishes the legal bases for personal data processing, transparency and information duties, and data subject rights including access, rectification, erasure, restriction, and portability, and defines the institutional role and enforcement powers of the Spanish Data Protection Authority (AEPD) with sanctioning mechanisms. It introduces and regulates an expanded catalogue of digital rights—such as internet neutrality, universal access, digital education, protection of minors online, digital disconnection at work, and the right to online correction—and provides specific provisions for certain contexts (e.g., employee monitoring, geolocation, and prior authorisation/notification for international data transfers). Compared with the GDPR, it offers more detailed national rules and operational norms in areas where the Regulation allows Member States discretion, especially regarding digital rights protections, conditions for minors’ data, employment-related data processing, international transfer mechanisms, and enforcement procedures.

results.title: Regulation (EU) 2025/37 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 19 December 2024 amending Regulation (EU) 2019/881 as regards managed security services
results.localTitle: 关于修订 (EU) 2019/881 号条例（关于托管安全服务）的第 2025/37 号条例
results.issuer: 欧洲议会与欧盟理事会/European Parliament and the Council of the European Union
results.summary: 本修正条例扩展了原2019/881号“网络安全法”范围，将欧盟网络安全认证框架扩展至托管安全服务（Managed Security Services），使得包括安全事件响应等服务的认证标准纳入欧盟统一体系，以完善整体网络安全认证体系。
results.englishSummary: This amending regulation extends the EU Cybersecurity Act’s certification framework to include managed security services, adding structured certification for services such as incident response under the unified EU scheme.

results.title: NOMOΣ ΥΠ’ ΑΡΙΘΜ. 4624
results.localTitle: 关于个人数据保护机构、实施通用数据保护条例以及将有关执法的数据保护指令转化为国家法律的第 4624/2019 号法律
results.summary: 该法律实施 Regulation (EU) 2016/679（GDPR） 及相关执法指令，通过设立独立的希腊数据保护机构（HDPA）、明确其调查权、罚款权限和程序规则，并对公共部门处理及特定敏感数据设定更具体的国家限制，从而在欧盟条例直接适用基础上提供更具操作性的执法执行与制裁框架。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation) and related enforcement directives by establishing an independent Hellenic Data Protection Authority (HDPA), defining its investigative powers, fine authority, and procedural rules, and by setting more specific national restrictions on public-sector processing and certain sensitive data, thereby providing a more operational enforcement and sanctioning framework alongside the directly applicable EU Regulation.

results.title: S.I. No. 297/2021 - European Union (Enforcement of data subjects’ rights on transfer of personal data outside the European Union) Regulations 2021
results.localTitle: 2021 年第 297 号法令——《2021 年欧盟（向欧盟以外地区传输个人数据时数据主体权利的实施）条例》
results.summary: 该条例实施 GDPR 关于数据主体在向欧盟以外地区传输个人数据时权利保障的相关规定，并明确执法程序与救济机制，使欧盟数据保护规则在跨境情形下具有国内执行路径。
results.englishSummary: This Regulation implements the GDPR provisions concerning data subjects’ rights in transfers of personal data outside the European Union, and clarifies enforcement procedures and remedies, thereby providing a domestic enforcement pathway for EU data protection rules in cross-border contexts.
results.topicLabel: 数据跨境传输与监管遵从

results.title: NOMOΣ ΥΠ’ ΑΡΙΘΜ. 5099
results.localTitle: 第5099/2024号法律（希腊关于欧盟数字服务法的执行法案）
results.summary: 该法律实施 Regulation (EU) 2022/2065（数字服务法），规定国家数字服务协调员、调查权、报告义务及行政处罚程序，并细化国家机制以加强监督和制裁措施，从而在欧盟条例直接适用基础上建立更具体的国家执行框架。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2022/2065 (Digital Services Act) by establishing the national Digital Services Coordinator, investigative powers, reporting obligations, and administrative sanction procedures, and by detailing national mechanisms to strengthen supervision and sanctions, thereby creating a more specific national enforcement framework alongside the directly applicable EU Regulation.

results.title: Bekendtgørelse om udpegning af kompetente myndigheder og digital kommunikation omfattet af NIS 2-loven
results.localTitle: 关于指定主管机关和受《国家信息系统法》第2条管辖的数字通信的行政命令
results.issuer: 社区安全和应急准备部
results.summary: 行政命令执行丹麦NIS2法，明确各行业主管机关及数字通信方式要求，细化报告渠道和机构协调程序，从而使指令转化后的义务具有更具体的行政操作规则。
results.englishSummary: This Executive Order implements the Danish NIS2 Act by designating sector-specific competent authorities and digital communication requirements, and by detailing reporting channels and inter-agency coordination procedures, thereby providing more concrete administrative operational rules for the transposed Directive obligations.

results.title: Lag (2022:482) om elektronisk kommunikation
results.localTitle: 电子通信法（2022:482），更新至SFS 2025:1511 第八章：安全性（网络和服务安全措施及数据保护规则） 第九章：交通数据处理和隐私保护
results.summary: 该法实施 Directive (EU) 2018/1972（欧洲电子通信法典） 并配合 Directive 2002/58/EC，在第八章规定网络与服务安全义务，在第九章细化流量数据和隐私保护规则，从而在欧盟电子通信框架下建立更系统化的国家安全与数据保护制度。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Directive (EU) 2018/1972 (European Electronic Communications Code) and complements Directive 2002/58/EC, establishing in Chapter 8 security obligations for networks and services and in Chapter 9 detailed rules on traffic data and privacy protection, thereby creating a structured national security and data protection regime within the EU electronic communications framework.
results.topicLabel: 交通管理与行业数据监管

results.title: Lov om supplerende bestemmelser til forordningen om harmoniserede regler om fair adgang til og anvendelse af data (datadelingsloven)
results.localTitle: 关于数据公平获取和使用统一规则条例（数据法案）的补充规定
results.summary: 该法补充实施 Regulation (EU) 2023/2854（数据法案），明确国家主管机关、争议解决和罚款程序，并细化数据访问与共享执行机制，从而在欧盟条例基础上提供更具操作性的国家实施规则。
results.englishSummary: This Act supplements Regulation (EU) 2023/2854 (Data Act) by designating national competent authorities, dispute resolution mechanisms, and fine procedures, and by detailing enforcement mechanisms for data access and sharing, thereby providing more operational national implementation rules alongside the EU Regulation.

results.title: Décret n° 2019-536 du 29 mai 2019 pris pour l’application de la loi n° 78-17 du 6 janvier 1978 relative à l’informatique, aux fichiers et aux libertés
results.localTitle: 第2019-536号法令，旨在实施1978年1月6日第78-17号法律（法国个人数据保护法实施细则）
results.referenceNo: Décret n° 2019-536 du 29 mai 2019 – NOR : JUSC1911425D
results.summary: 法国第 2019-536 号法令是为了实施 1978 年1 月 6 日第 78-17 号《数据处理、数据文件和个人自由法》（个人数据保护法） 而制定的重要执行细则，该法令对个人数据保护法与 欧盟通用数据保护条例（GDPR，Regulation (EU) 2016/679） 的衔接提供了具体程序性规范和执行框架。法令详细规定了 法国国家信息与自由委员会（CNIL） 的组织、组成与权限；数据处理活动监督（包括现场检查、在线审查和听证权）；行政措施和制裁程序（包括整改通知、纠正措施和罚则执行程序）；以及数据主体权利实施和控制程序。该法令同时明确了数据保护影响评估、DPO（数据保护官）任命及其通知义务、数据泄露通知程序等操作性要求，并对联合数据控制者、处理者之间的义务分配、数据出口程序及 CNIL 的咨询机制等提供具体执行细则。在 GDPR 的总体原则下，该法令补充法国国内在程序性执行、具体制裁程序和 CNIL 权限分工上更具操作性的规定。
results.englishSummary: The French Decree No. 2019-536 of 29 May 2019 is a key implementing measure of the French Data Protection Act (Law No. 78-17 of 6 January 1978) in the context of the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR, Regulation (EU) 2016/679). The Decree provides detailed procedural and enforcement rules to align the 1978 law with GDPR requirements, including the organisation, powers, and operational procedures of the French Data Protection Authority (CNIL); mechanisms for supervision of data processing activities (on-site and online inspections, hearings); administrative corrective measures and sanctions processes (e.g., notices of non-compliance, corrective actions, enforcement procedures); and specific rules on data subject rights implementation. It also specifies operational requirements for data protection officers (DPOs), notification of personal data breaches, data protection impact assessments, cooperation between joint controllers/processors, and CNIL’s consultation processes. Under the GDPR’s general principles, this Decree supplements them with France-specific procedural and enforcement details to make data protection obligations actionable at the national level.

results.title: Guidelines on Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) and determining whether processing is likely to result in a high risk (WP248 rev.01)
results.localTitle: 《数据保护影响评估（DPIA）指南》
results.issuer: Article 29 工作组 / EDPB 承袭
results.summary: 指南帮助判断 何时需要进行 DPIA（如高风险处理场景），并提供实际步骤：描述处理操作、评估风险/影响、设计风险缓解措施、记录和更新 DPIA。强调 DPIA 应在处理开始之前进行，并在生命周期内更新。
results.englishSummary: Guidelines： Provides criteria on when a DPIA is required under Article 35 GDPR and how to determine if processing is likely to result in high risk to data subjects’ rights/freedoms. Sets out a structured methodology for assessing risks, documenting processing descriptions (nature, scope, context, purpose), evaluating necessity and proportionality, and identifying measures to mitigate risks.

results.title: Disposizioni e deleghe al Governo in materia di intelligenza artificiale
results.localTitle: 2025年9月23日第132号法律-关于人工智能的规定和对政府的授权
results.issuer: 意大利共和国众议院和参议院
results.summary: 意大利 第 132 号 2025 年法律 建立首个全国性人工智能综合框架，以补充和协调欧盟 《人工智能法案》（Regulation (EU) 2024/1689） 在本国的实施，确立了以 以人为本、安全透明和权利保护为核心 的 AI 发展与监管原则，要求 AI 系统开发与应用必须符合透明度、比例性、数据保护、非歧视和网络安全等基本原则，并明确了在卫生、劳动、教育、司法、公共管理和体育等多个领域的具体 AI 应用限制与监管要求；同时赋予政府权力制定具体执行细则并授权相关国家机构（如 Agency for Digital Italy (AgID) 和 National Cybersecurity Agency (ACN)）监督 AI 系统及应用，在刑法层面引入针对恶意利用或传播 AI 生成/篡改内容（如深度伪造）的处罚，该法律并不取代欧盟 AI Act，而是在国家战略制定、具体应用监管、行业细则、刑事责任和数据保护补充等方面给出更细化的国内规则。
results.englishSummary: Italian Law No. 132 of 23 September 2025 establishes the first comprehensive national framework on artificial intelligence in Italy to complement and align with the EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689). It enshrines human-centred, transparent, secure, and rights-respecting principles for AI research, development, deployment, and use, mandating compliance with transparency, proportionality, data protection, non-discrimination, and cybersecurity standards. The law sets out sector-specific rules for AI use in areas such as healthcare, employment, education, justice, public administration, and sports, and empowers the Italian Government to adopt detailed implementing decrees. It designates national authorities—including the Agency for Digital Italy (AgID) and the National Cybersecurity Agency (ACN)—to oversee AI deployment, introduces criminal sanctions for unlawful dissemination or misuse of AI-generated content (e.g., deepfakes), and supplements the AI Act with national provisions on strategy, governance, and specific protections. While it does not supersede the EU AI Act, it provides more detailed domestic rules for national implementation and enforcement.

results.title: Gesetz zur Änderung des Straßenverkehrsgesetzes und des Pflichtversicherungsgesetzes – Gesetz zum autonomen Fahren
results.localTitle: （道路交通法及强制保险法修正法——自动驾驶法案）
results.referenceNo: BGBl. I 2021 Nr. 48, S. 3108（《联邦法律公报》第 I 部 2021 年第 48 号，第 3108 页）
results.issuer: 德国联邦议院（Deutscher Bundestag）和联邦参议院（Bundesrat）
results.summary: 德国《自动驾驶法案》通过修改《道路交通法》（StVG）与《强制保险法》（PflVG），为自主驾驶汽车在德国公共道路上合法运行建立首个全国性法律框架，允许在特定“规定运营区域”内无需驾驶员物理在场即可运营自动驾驶车辆。该法明确车辆在运营中的技术要求（例如必须能独立执行驾驶任务、进入“风险最小状态”、具备事故预防与替代操作能力等）及技术监督责任（由“技术监督人员”执行安全监控与决策支持），并规定了运营许可由联邦机动车管理局（KBA）审核发放、数据存储与共享义务、车辆安全相关信息披露和制造商风险评估/信息安全保障义务。与欧盟现有统一技术型式批准与安全法规（如 Regulation (EU) 2018/858 与 Regulation (EU) 2019/2144）主要聚焦车辆技术标准不同，该法提供了国内可操作的道路运行条件、监督机制与运营许可程序，填补了欧盟法规在道路级自动驾驶运营许可与管理方面的空白。
results.englishSummary: The German Act amending the Road Traffic Act and the Compulsory Insurance Act – Act on Autonomous Driving establishes the first national legal framework in Germany permitting autonomous vehicles to operate on public roads without a physically present driver in defined operational areas. It amends the Road Traffic Act (StVG) and the Compulsory Insurance Act (PflVG) to specify technical requirements (e.g., capability to perform driving tasks independently, transition to a “risk-minimal condition,” and safety-critical redundancy), operational oversight responsibilities (with a designated “technical oversight person”), and procedures for operating permits issued by the Kraftfahrt-Bundesamt (KBA). It also imposes obligations for data storage, data access, manufacturer risk assessments, and information security. Unlike EU level type-approval and safety regulations (e.g., Regulation (EU) 2018/858 and Regulation (EU) 2019/2144) that set general vehicle technical standards, this law fills a domestic gap by establishing operational conditions, monitoring mechanisms, and approval procedures for autonomous driving on public roads in Germany.

results.title: The Digital Markets Act | A short guide for tech challengers
results.localTitle: 数字市场法案 | 科技挑战者的简要指南
results.issuer: 比利时竞争管理局(Autorité Belge de la Concurrenc，ABC）
results.summary: 该指南解释 Regulation (EU) 2022/1925（数字市场法） 的核心义务、守门人规则及合规风险，并说明比利时竞争管理局在国家层面的协助和信息交换职责，从而在欧盟委员会主导执法框架下提供实践层面的解释与程序性补充，而未改变欧盟法规的执法权分配结构。
results.englishSummary: This guide explains the core obligations, gatekeeper rules, and compliance risks under Regulation (EU) 2022/1925 (Digital Markets Act), and clarifies the supporting and information-sharing role of the Belgian Competition Authority at national level, thereby providing practical interpretative and procedural supplements within the Commission-led enforcement framework without altering the allocation of enforcement powers under the EU Regulation.

results.title: Number 2 of 2024 DIGITAL SERVICES ACT 2024
results.localTitle: 2024年数字服务法案
results.summary: 该法实施 Regulation (EU) 2022/2065，指定国家数字服务协调员及主管机关，并规定调查权、行政罚款和执法程序，从而在欧盟条例直接适用基础上建立完整的国家执行与制裁体系。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2022/2065 (Digital Services Act) by designating the national Digital Services Coordinator and competent authorities, and by establishing investigative powers, administrative fines, and enforcement procedures, thereby creating a comprehensive national enforcement and sanctioning framework alongside the directly applicable EU Regulation.

results.title: Regulation (EU)2023/988 of the European Parliament and of the Council(General Product Safety Regulation)(GPSR)
results.localTitle: 通用产品安全法规
results.issuer: 欧洲议会与欧盟理事会/European Parliament and the Council of the European Union
results.summary: 《通用产品安全法规》（GPSR） 是欧盟统一的非食品类消费品安全管理框架，适用于在欧盟市场销售的所有消费品。它规定了投放市场的产品必须满足的通用安全要求，明确了制造商、进口商、分销商及在线市场等所有经济运营商在产品全链条中的安全责任。该法规重点关注市场监督的强化（包括成员国监管机构间的信息协作与快速干预机制）以及产品可追溯性（如要求建立产品合规性信息和技术文件）。其核心目的是确保欧盟内部市场流通的消费品具备高水平的安全性，为消费者提供统一且强有力的保护，并适应特别是线上销售等现代市场环境的发展变化。
results.englishSummary: General Product Safety Regulation is the EU's harmonized safety management framework for non-food consumer products. It applies to all consumer products sold on the EU market. The regulation sets out the general safety requirement that products placed on the market must meet, and clarifies the safety obligations of all economic operators—including manufacturers, importers, distributors, and online marketplaces—throughout the entire supply chain. It emphasizes strengthening market surveillance (including information exchange and rapid intervention mechanisms among national authorities) and enhancing product traceability (such as requiring the availability of compliance information and technical documentation). Its core objective is to ensure a high level of safety for consumer products circulating within the EU internal market, providing consistent and robust protection for consumers, and adapting to modern market developments, particularly online sales.

results.title: Regeling vergunningverlening experimenten zelfrijdende auto
results.localTitle: 《自动驾驶汽车实验许可的监管》

results.summary: 该法规建立荷兰境内自动驾驶车辆实验的许可审批制度，在国家层面具体规定实验申请程序、监督条件及主管机关的审批权限等规定。
results.englishSummary: This law establishes a licensing and approval system for autonomous vehicle experiments in the Netherlands, specifying at the national level the application procedures, monitoring conditions, and the approval authority of the competent authorities.

results.title: Regeling voertuigen
results.localTitle: 荷兰车辆法规
results.summary: 该法规规范机动车辆及其系统和零部件的技术要求与型式批准程序，实施 Regulation (EU) 2018/858，并在国家层面细化技术标准引用、检测方法、认证文件要求及市场监督措施，从而提供比欧盟法规更具体的技术适用规则与行政执行路径。
results.englishSummary: This Regulation governs the technical requirements and type-approval procedures for motor vehicles and their systems and components, implementing Regulation (EU) 2018/858, and further detailing at national level the referenced technical standards, testing methods, certification documentation requirements, and market surveillance measures, thereby providing more specific technical applicability rules and administrative enforcement pathways than the EU Regulation itself.

results.title: DECRETO LEGISLATIVO 7 ottobre 2024, n. 144 Norme di adeguamento della normativa nazionale alle disposizioni del regolamento (UE) 2022/868 del Parlamento europeo e del Consiglio, del 30 maggio 2022, relativo alla governance europea dei dati e che modifica il regolamento (UE) 2018/1724. (24G00167)
results.localTitle: 2024年10月7日第144号立法法令 使国家立法符合欧洲议会和理事会 2022 年 5 月 30 日关于欧洲数据治理和修订 (EU) 2018/1724 号条例的 (EU) 2022/868 号条例规定的规则
results.summary: 该立法法令用于实施 Regulation (EU) 2022/868（Data Governance Act），通过指定国家主管机构、设立数据中介服务登记制度、明确公共部门数据再利用程序及监管处罚机制，使欧盟数据治理规则在意大利形成具体执法与监管结构，并补充了行政监督和制裁安排。
results.englishSummary: This Legislative Decree implements Regulation (EU) 2022/868 (Data Governance Act) by designating the competent national authorities, establishing a registration regime for data intermediation services, defining procedures for the re-use of public sector data, and introducing supervisory and sanctioning mechanisms, thereby creating an enforceable national regulatory framework for the application of the EU data governance regime in Italy.

results.title: Gids AI-verordening
results.localTitle: 欧盟人工智能法案指南
results.summary: 该指南由荷兰政府部门发布，面向企业和组织解释 Regulation (EU) 2024/1689（欧盟人工智能法案，AI Act） 的主要规定、风险分类、义务主体角色和合规步骤，通过分步骤说明风险评估、AI 系统识别、责任归属及相关义务的适用原则，为尚未完成国内具体实施立法的情况下提供了更具操作性的理解框架与实务指引，以帮助组织在荷兰提前理解和准备 AI 法案的合规要求。
results.englishSummary: This guide, published by the Dutch government, explains to businesses and organisations the key provisions, risk classifications, stakeholder roles, and compliance steps under Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 (EU Artificial Intelligence Act, AI Act), and by outlining practical steps such as risk assessment, identification of AI systems, determination of roles, and applicable obligations, it provides a more operational interpretative framework and practical guidance in the absence of completed national implementing legislation, helping organisations in the Netherlands understand and prepare for AI Act compliance.
results.topicLabel: 人工智能与新技术治理

results.title: 2011. évi CXII. törvény az információs önrendelkezési jogról és az információszabadságról
results.localTitle: 2011年第CXII号法案《信息自决权和信息自由法》（经2018年第XXXVIII号法案修订）
results.summary: 该法实施 Regulation (EU) 2016/679（GDPR） 并整合信息自由规则，明确国家数据保护和信息自由局的权限、行政程序及罚款上限，并细化公共部门数据披露义务和执法程序，从而在欧盟法规直接适用基础上提供更具操作性的国家执行与制裁框架。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation) and consolidates freedom of information rules, defining the powers, procedures, and fine ceilings of the national data protection authority, and detailing public-sector disclosure obligations and enforcement procedures, thereby providing a more operational national enforcement and sanctioning framework alongside the directly applicable EU Regulation.

results.title: Road Traffic Act（StVG）
results.localTitle: 道路交通法
results.referenceNo: 帝国议会（1909 初版），后续版本由德意志联邦共和国联邦议院&联邦参议院
results.issuer: 德国联邦议院（Deutscher Bundestag）和联邦参议院（Bundesrat）
results.summary: 《德国道路交通法》（StVG）是德国道路交通领域的基础性联邦法律，规定机动车登记、驾驶许可、交通违法处罚及机动车运行所致损害的危险责任制度，并为道路交通技术监管提供法定授权。在车辆型式认证方面，StVG确立车辆必须依法取得型式批准或个别许可方可登记和上路的法律原则，授权联邦主管机关制定具体技术准入规则，并承认欧盟整车型式批准制度在德国的适用，由联邦机动车管理局（KBA）负责型式批准、市场监督及召回管理。
results.englishSummary: The German Road Traffic Act (StVG) is the fundamental federal law governing road traffic in Germany. It regulates vehicle registration, driving licences, traffic offences and penalties, and establishes a strict liability regime (Gefährdungshaftung) for damage caused by the operation of motor vehicles, while providing the statutory basis for technical road traffic supervision. With regard to vehicle type approval, the StVG establishes the legal principle that vehicles must obtain a valid type approval or individual approval before registration and use on public roads, authorises the competent federal authorities to issue detailed technical admission rules, recognises the applicability of the EU whole vehicle type-approval system in Germany, and designates the Federal Motor Transport Authority (KBA) as responsible for type approval, market surveillance, and recall measures.
results.topicLabel: 交通管理与行业数据监管

results.title: NOMOΣ ΥΠ’ ΑΡΙΘΜ. 4624
results.localTitle: 关于个人数据保护机构、实施通用数据保护条例以及将有关执法的数据保护指令转化为国家法律的第 4624/2019 号法律
results.summary: 该法律实施 Regulation (EU) 2016/679（GDPR） 及相关执法指令，通过设立独立的希腊数据保护机构（HDPA）、明确其调查权、罚款权限和程序规则，并对公共部门处理及特定敏感数据设定更具体的国家限制，从而在欧盟条例直接适用基础上提供更具操作性的执法执行与制裁框架。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation) and related enforcement directives by establishing an independent Hellenic Data Protection Authority (HDPA), defining its investigative powers, fine authority, and procedural rules, and by setting more specific national restrictions on public-sector processing and certain sensitive data, thereby providing a more operational enforcement and sanctioning framework alongside the directly applicable EU Regulation.

results.title: Νόμος 3471/2006 — Προστασία δεδομένων προσωπικού χαρακτήρα και της ιδιωτικής ζωής στον τομέα των ηλεκτρονικών επικοινωνιών και τροποποίηση του ν. 2472/1997
results.localTitle: 关于在电子通信领域保护个人数据和隐私，并修改第 2472/1997 号法律的第3471/2006法律
results.summary: 该法律转化实施 Directive 2002/58/EC（电子隐私指令） 及其修正，通过定义电子通信流量和位置数据处理、营销通信限制及用户同意规则，并设定监管程序与罚款机制，从而在国家层面提供比欧盟指令更具体的行业性隐私保护要求。
results.englishSummary: This Act transposes Directive 2002/58/EC (ePrivacy Directive) and its amendments by defining the processing of traffic and location data in electronic communications, restrictions on marketing communications, and user consent requirements, and by establishing supervisory procedures and fine mechanisms, thereby providing more specific sectoral privacy protection requirements at national level than the EU Directive.

results.title: （NISG2026）Netz- und Informationssystemsicherheitsgesetz 2026 sowie Änderung des Telekommunikationsgesetzes 2021 und des Gesundheitstelematikgesetzes 2012/《Network and Information Systems Security Act 2026》（NISG 2026）

results.summary: 该法实施 Directive (EU) 2022/2555（NIS2 指令），界定关键与重要实体范围、规定强制风险管理和报告义务，并通过修订《2021年电信法》和《2012年健康远程信息处理法》在特定行业设定更具体的技术和组织安全要求及罚款机制，从而提供更具操作性的国家网络安全监管体系。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Directive (EU) 2022/2555 (NIS2 Directive) by defining the scope of essential and important entities and establishing mandatory risk management and reporting obligations, and by amending the Telecommunications Act 2021 and the Health Telematics Act 2012 to introduce more specific technical and organizational security requirements and fine mechanisms in certain sectors, thereby providing a more operational national cybersecurity supervisory framework.

results.title: Lag (2018:218) med kompletterande bestämmelser till EU:s dataskyddsförordning

results.englishSummary: This Act supplements Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation) by defining the powers of the Swedish Data Protection Authority (IMY), rules on administrative fines, restrictions on public authority processing, and national exemptions for research, archiving and journalism, thereby providing a more specific public-sector and rights-limitation framework alongside the directly applicable GDPR.

results.title: Zákon č. 387/2024 Sb. Zákon o obecné bezpečnosti výrobků a o změně některých souvisejících zákonů

results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2023/988 (General Product Safety Regulation) by establishing market surveillance, risk assessment, recall and fine mechanisms, thereby creating the national enforcement and sanctioning framework within the EU product safety regime.

results.title: Resilienz kritischer Einrichtungen-Gesetz sowie Änderung des Tilgungsgesetzes 1972

results.englishSummary: This Act implements Directive (EU) 2022/2557 (Critical Entities Resilience Directive) by establishing risk assessment, business continuity planning, and national supervisory measures for critical entities, and by defining investigative powers and fine levels for competent authorities, thereby providing more concrete enforcement and sanctioning rules at national level.

results.title: 奥地利《Data Protection Act (Datenschutzgesetz, DSG)》
results.localTitle: 奥地利联邦数据保护法

results.englishSummary: This Act implements and supplements Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation) by defining the powers, administrative procedures, and criminal sanctions of the Austrian Data Protection Authority, and by setting more specific national restrictions for public-sector processing and certain data categories, thereby providing a more operational enforcement and sanctioning framework alongside the directly applicable EU Regulation.

results.title: Regulation (EU) 2022/2065 of the European Parliament and of the Council (Digital Services Act) (DSA)
results.localTitle: 《数字服务法案》
results.issuer: 欧洲议会与欧盟理事会/European Parliament and the Council of the European Union
results.summary: 《数字服务法案》（DSA）是欧盟针对在线中介服务提供商确立的统一责任与透明度框架。它适用于在欧盟境内提供服务的各类在线平台，包括网络基础设施、托管服务、在线平台以及被认定为具有系统性风险的超大型在线平台（VLOPs）和超大型在线搜索引擎（VLOSEs）。法案基于平台规模和风险建立了分层义务体系，核心内容包括：增强非法内容处理透明度与用户申诉机制、规范在线广告投放、加强对在线市场交易者的核查义务，以及要求VLOPs/VLOSEs进行系统性风险评估并采取减缓措施。其核心机制是建立欧盟范围内的协同监管网络并赋予欧盟委员会对VLOPs/VLOSEs的直接监督与执法权。该法案的核心目的在于打造更安全的数字环境，保护用户在线上行使基本权利，同时为数字服务的提供建立统一、公平的责任规则，促进数字单一市场的创新与竞争。
results.englishSummary: The Digital Services Act (DSA) is the EU's harmonized framework for the liability and transparency of online intermediary service providers. It applies to various online platforms offering services within the EU, including network infrastructure, hosting services, online platforms, and those designated as Very Large Online Plat forms (VLOPs) or Very Large Online Search Engines (VLOSEs) posing systemic risks.The Act establishes a tiered system of obligations based on platform size and risk. Key provisions include enhancing transparency in handling illegal content and user complaint mechanisms, regulating online advertising, strengthening due diligence obligations for traders on online marketplaces, and requiring VLOPs/VLOSEs to conduct systemic risk assessments and implement mitigation measures. Its core mechanism involves creating a coordinated supervision network across the EU and granting the European Commission direct oversight and enforcement powers over VLOPs/VLOSEs. The primary aim of the DSA is to create a safer digital environment, protect users' fundamental rights online, establish uniform and fair liability rules for digital services, and foster innovation and competition within the digital single market.

results.title: Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council (General Data Protection Regulation)(GDPR)
results.localTitle: 《欧洲议会和理事会第2016/679号条例》（通用数据保护条例）
results.issuer: 欧洲议会与欧盟理事会/European Parliament and the Council of the European Union
results.summary: 《欧盟通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）是欧盟统一的数据保护框架，适用于所有在欧盟内处理个人数据的实体，以及面向欧盟数据主体提供服务/产品的非欧盟实体。它确立了数据主体的权利（如访问、删除和纠正权）、数据控制者和处理者的义务，并规定了合法的个人数据处理依据（如同意、合同履行等）。GDPR重点关注数据保护影响评估（DPIA）、数据跨境传输合规（通过充分性决定、标准合同条款等）以及特定领域如电子通信的额外保护要求。其核心目的是保障个人数据的安全性和隐私权，同时确保跨境数据流动的合规性。
results.englishSummary: The General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) is the EU's unified data protection framework, applicable to all entities processing personal data within the EU and non-EU entities offering services /products to EU data subjects. It establishes the rights of data subjects (such as the rights of access, erasure, and rectification), the obligations of data controllers and processors, and defines lawful bases for personal data processing (such as consent, contract performance, etc.). GDPR focuses on Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs), cross-border data transfer compliance (through adequacy decisions, Standard Contractual Clauses, etc.), and additional protections for specific sectors like electronic communications. Its core aim is to safeguard personal data security and privacy while ensuring compliance for cross-border data flows.
results.topicLabel: 数据跨境传输与监管遵从

results.title: Isikuandmete kaitse seadus
results.localTitle: 个人数据保护法
results.summary: 爱沙尼亚《个人数据保护法》在实施欧盟《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）基础上规定了个人数据处理的国家具体义务、权利救济及监督机制，并细化了数据主体权利、自动决策规则、数据泄露通报及监管机构职责等内容。 更具操作性补充： 在GDPR框架内明确了国家监管机构（数据保护监察员）的程序性权限、管理细则和数据主体救济途径
results.englishSummary: The Estonian Personal Data Protection Act, implementing the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), establishes detailed national obligations for personal data processing, rights enforcement and supervisory mechanisms, further specifying data subject rights, automated decision-making, data breach notifications, and supervisory authority responsibilities. More operational supplements: Within the GDPR framework, the procedural powers, management details, and remedies available to data subjects are clearly defined for national regulatory bodies (data protection inspectors).

results.title: Uitvoeringswet Algemene verordening gegevensbescherming
results.localTitle: 《通用数据保护条例实施法》
results.summary: 该法是荷兰国内层面为执行欧盟GDPR而制定的实施法律，旨在补充 GDPR 在国家层面留给成员国裁量的规则和细则。该法明确了 GDPR 在荷兰的适用范围、定义相关术语、设立独立数据保护监督机构（Autoriteit persoonsgegevens）、规定该机构的组织结构、职责与成员任命机制，并就 GDPR 在国内法律体系中的例外、应用范围边界、未成年人同意年龄及特定领域（如科研、档案馆处理、公共登记）给予具体例外和操作性规定。法律还废除了先前的《个人数据保护法》（Wet bescherming persoonsgegevens），并确立了 GDPR 作为主法规同时通过国内法细化执行规则，提高了 GDPR 在荷兰的数据保护治理体系的可操作性和合规性。
results.englishSummary: The Act is the national implementing statute that gives effect to the GDPR in the Netherlands. It specifies the scope of application and definitions referenced in the GDPR, establishes the independent supervisory authority (Autoriteit persoonsgegevens), sets out its organisational composition, appointment procedures, and powers, and provides for domestic interpretations and exceptions in areas where the GDPR allows Member State discretion. These include provisions on processing for scientific research or statistical purposes, archiving in the public interest, use of national identification numbers, public registers, and the age of consent for minors, among others. The Act also repeals the former Dutch Personal Data Protection Act (Wet bescherming persoonsgegevens) and embeds GDPR as the primary data protection law with accompanying national detail rules to ensure practical enforceability and compliance within Dutch law.

results.title: Legislative Decree No. 138/2024
results.localTitle: 2024年9月4日第138号立法法令-NIS2转化立法
results.issuer: 意大利议会（Parlamento Italiano） 授权政府制定
results.summary: 意大利 第 138 号立法法令（2024 年 9 月 4 日） 是意大利为转化并实施欧盟 NIS2 指令（Directive (EU) 2022/2555）* 而制定的国内网络与信息系统安全法律框架，旨在确保在意大利境内达到欧盟范围内共同且高水平的网络安全保护标准**。该法令确立了国家层面网络安全策略、指定 国家网络安全局（Agenzia per la cybersicurezza nazionale） 作为权威机构负责监督执行、制定实施细则与指导意见，并明确了 “关键实体”和“重要实体”等受规制对象的安全义务（包括技术与组织风险管理措施）、事故重大事件通知义务、以及运营登记与持续合规要求等；与 NIS2 指令相比，国内法在具体义务分工、监管机构指定、重大事件报告和实施细则授权机制上提供更清晰的国内操作路径，包括赋予政府及主管机关通过附属法令细化安全措施、过渡过渡期安排和制裁执行等规定。
results.englishSummary: The Italian Legislative Decree No. 138 of 4 September 2024 transposes Directive (EU) 2022/2555 (the NIS2 Directive) into Italian national law, establishing a domestic cybersecurity framework to achieve a high common level of cybersecurity across critical infrastructure and essential services in Italy. It sets out a national cybersecurity strategy, designates the National Cybersecurity Agency (Agenzia per la cybersicurezza nazionale) as the competent authority to oversee implementation, and provides for entities identified as “essential” or “important” to adopt proportionate technical and organisational security measures. The Decree also includes obligations for significant incident notification, registration and continuous compliance, and authorises the Government and relevant authorities to issue subsidiary measures and guidance. Compared to the NIS2 Directive itself, the Italian Decree offers more specific national implementation mechanisms, detailed institutional roles, incident reporting processes, and transitional arrangements, including empowering authorities to define basic security standards and enforcement provisions.

results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 (Artificial Intelligence Act) by designating the national competent and market surveillance authorities, and by establishing investigative powers, administrative penalties, and compliance inspection procedures, thereby creating a comprehensive national enforcement and supervisory framework alongside the directly applicable EU Regulation.

results.title: HCNIL issues guidance on deepfakes and illegal AI‑generated content——ypertrucage (deepfake) : comment se protéger et signaler les contenus illicites
results.localTitle: CNIL关于深度伪造和非法人工智能生成内容的指导意见
results.issuer: 法国政府（Gouvernement）：国家信息与自由委员会Commission nationale de l’informatique et des libertés（CNIL）
results.summary: 该指南由 CNIL 发布，聚焦于 深度伪造和非法 AI 生成内容的法律风险与合规措施，旨在通过实用操作指南的形式帮助组织遵守《欧盟人工智能法》，防范 AI 生成内容过程中的隐私侵害、欺骗性传播、人格权侵犯等风险。核心内容包括： 定义与风险识别：什么构成深度伪造及非法生成内容 个人数据保护义务：AI 生成内容中涉及他人面部、声音或识别特征时的数据保护风险分析 合法性评估：如何确保生成内容遵守合法基础（如同意、合法权益等） 透明度与标识义务：建议在生成内容中标注 AI 生成的性质、防止混淆或误导 责任与补救措施：组织在发现违法内容时的移除、纠正与举报程序。
results.englishSummary: This guidance, issued by the CNIL, focuses on the legal risks and compliance measures relating to deepfakes and unlawful AI-generated content. It aims, through practical operational guidance, to assist organizations in complying with the EU Artificial Intelligence Act and in mitigating risks such as privacy infringements, deceptive dissemination, and violations of personality rights arising from AI-generated content. The core elements include: Definition and risk identification: what constitutes a deepfake and unlawful AI-generated content; Data protection obligations: analysis of data protection risks where AI-generated content involves another person’s face, voice, or other identifying characteristics; Assessment of lawfulness: how to ensure that the generation and use of such content rely on a valid legal basis (such as consent or legitimate interests); Transparency and labelling obligations: recommending that AI-generated content be clearly identified as such to prevent confusion or misleading effects; Liability and remedial measures: procedures for removal, correction, and reporting when unlawful content is identified.
results.topicLabel: 人工智能与新技术治理

results.title: S.I. No. 726/2024 – European Union (General Product Safety) Regulations 2024
results.localTitle: SI No. 726/2024 - 2024 年欧盟（通用产品安全）法规
results.issuer: 爱尔兰企业、贸易与就业部长（Minister for Enterprise, Trade and Employment）
results.summary: 该法规是对欧盟通用产品安全条例的国内执行细则，旨在建立现代化的消费品安全框架，适用于线上与线下销售的非食品消费品。在欧盟 GPSR 规定的基础上，该法规明确了市场参与者义务、监督机构执行机制及产品可追溯性要求，有助于在爱尔兰境内确保放置或提供市场的产品具有安全性，并在国内市场监管实践中提供更具体的操作性规定。
results.englishSummary: This regulation, implementing EU General Product Safety Regulation into Irish law, establishes a modern consumer product safety framework for both online and offline sales of non-food consumer products. It specifies market operator obligations, surveillance enforcement mechanisms, and product traceability requirements beyond the EU text to provide concrete actionable rules for ensuring product safety in the Irish market.

results.summary: 该法律补充和实施欧盟GDPR（Regulation (EU) 2016/679） 在比利时境内的规则，规定在欧盟直接适用 GDPR 之外允许成员国设定的国家性选择与例外，如设定儿童同意年龄、对敏感数据处理者的访问列表要求等。该法律还跨领域整合刑事司法数据、公共部门数据处理等，使比利时国内对个人数据保护制度更广泛且具有本国特色要求。
results.englishSummary: This law supplements and implements the EU GDPR (Regulation (EU) 2016/679) in Belgium by setting national-specific choices and derogations, such as a lower age of consent and specific access-list requirements for sensitive data handlers. It also integrates provisions for criminal justice and public authority data processing, creating a broader national data protection framework beyond the directly applicable EU regulation

results.title: Regulation (EU) 2023/2854 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 13 December 2023 on harmonised rules on fair access to and use of data and amending Regulation (EU) 2017/2394 and Directive (EU) 2020/1828 (Data Act)

results.title: Act on Liability for Defective Products (ProdhaftG)

results.summary: 德国《产品责任法》规定厂商对于存在缺陷产品所致损害承担无过错责任，产品缺陷涵盖安全性低于合理预期的情况；相对欧盟产品责任指令（85/374/EEC），该法确立严格责任机制并明确纳入包括电气与机械产品，保护消费者权利，但对某些数字产品特性和连网服务的责任界定尚待进一步现代化改革。
results.englishSummary: The German Act on Liability for Defective Products (ProdhaftG) imposes strict (no-fault) liability on manufacturers for damage caused by defective products and defines defects as the lack of safety reasonably expected; as a national implementation of the EU Directive 85/374/EEC, it establishes a strict liability regime covering mechanical and electrical products, enhancing consumer protection, though adaptation to digital products and connected services remains subject to further modernization.

results.title: Regulation (EU) 2022/868 of the European Parliament and of the Council(Data Governance Act)(DGA)
results.localTitle: 《数据治理法案》
results.issuer: 欧洲议会与欧盟理事会/European Parliament and the Council of the European Union
results.summary: 《数据治理法案》（Data Governance Act, DGA）是欧盟建立的统一数据共享与利用框架，旨在促进公共部门、企业和个人所持有数据的可用性与互信流通。它适用于欧盟境内的公共部门数据、企业数据以及基于数据利他主义（Data Altruism）自愿共享的个人与非个人数据。该法案核心在于建立可信的数据共享机制：为公共部门数据的再利用设定统一条件（尤其是涉及知识产权或商业秘密保护的数据）；规范新兴的数据中介服务，要求其保持严格中立且不得对共享数据谋利；并正式认可基于数据利他主义的自愿数据共享。其关键机制包括在欧盟层面设立数据创新委员会进行协调，并为数据中介服务和数据利他主义组织建立通用欧盟注册与认证体系。该法案的核心目的是增加社会对数据共享的信任、打通数据孤岛，并通过增强数据可用性来释放数据的经济与社会价值，同时确保对权利（特别是个人数据保护）的充分尊重。
results.englishSummary: The Data Governance Act (DGA) is the EU's harmonized framework for data sharing and utilization, aimed at promoting the availability and trusted flow of data held by public sectors, businesses, and individuals. It applies to public sector data, corporate data within the EU, as well as personal and non-personal data voluntarily shared based on data altruism.The core of the Act lies in establishing trusted mechanisms for data sharing: setting uniform conditions for the reuse of protected public sector data (particularly data involving intellectual property or commercial secrets); regulating emerging data intermediation services, requiring strict neutrality and prohibiting monetization of shared data; and formally recognizing voluntary data sharing based on data altruism. Its key mechanisms include establishing a European Data Innovation Board for coordination at the EU level and creating a common EU registration and certification system for data intermediation services and data altruism organizations.The primary aim of the DGA is to increase societal trust in data sharing, break down data silos, and unlock the economic and social value of data by enhancing its availability, while ensuring full respect for rights, particularly the protection of personal data.

results.title: Regulation (EU) 2022/1925 of the European Parliament and of the Council (Digital Markets Act) (DMA)
results.localTitle: 《数字市场法案》
results.issuer: 欧洲议会与欧盟理事会/European Parliament and the Council of the European Union
results.summary: 《数字市场法案》（DMA）是欧盟针对大型在线平台制定的统一竞争规则框架，适用于被认定为“守门人”的核心平台服务提供商（如应用商店、搜索引擎、社交网络等）。该法案确立了禁止性义务（如不得滥用优势地位、不得自我偏好、必须允许互操作性）和积极性义务（如开放数据共享、允许业务用户推广独立服务）。其核心机制包括通过量化指标（如营业额、用户规模）界定守门人，并赋予欧盟委员会直接执法权与高额罚款权。法案的核心目的是确保数字市场的公平性与可竞争性，遏制垄断行为，促进创新，并为用户与中小企业提供更多选择。
results.englishSummary: The Digital Markets Act (DMA) is the EU's harmonized competition rule framework targeting large online platforms. It applies to providers of core platform services (e.g., app stores, search engines, social networks) designated as gatekeepers. The Act establishes prohibitive obligations (e.g., prohibiting the abuse of advantageous positions, self-preferencing, and requiring interoperability) and positive obligations (e.g., mandating data sharing and allowing business users to promote independent offers). Its core mechanism involves identifying gatekeepers based on quantitative thresholds (such as turnover and user base) and grants the European Commission direct enforcement powers, including the authority to impose substantial fines. The primary aim of the DMA is to ensure fairness and contestability in digital markets, curb monopolistic practices, foster innovation, and provide more choices for users and small and medium-sized enterprises.

results.title: The Act of 10 May 2018 on the Protection of Personal Data
results.localTitle: 2018年5月10日个人数据保护法（合并版）
results.summary: 该法实施 Regulation (EU) 2016/679（GDPR），设立个人数据保护局（UODO）并规定调查程序、行政罚款计算方式及公共部门数据处理的具体限制，从而在欧盟条例直接适用基础上提供更具操作性的执法机制和程序细化规则。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation) by establishing the Personal Data Protection Office (UODO), defining investigative procedures, administrative fine calculation methods, and specific restrictions for public-sector data processing, thereby providing a more operational enforcement mechanism and procedural clarification alongside the directly applicable EU Regulation.

results.title: Uitvoeringswet dataverordening
results.localTitle: 《数据监管实施法案》
results.summary: 该法是荷兰为在国内实施欧盟《数据法》（Regulation (EU) 2023/2854）而制定的国家法律，用于落地和细化该欧盟法规的执行机制。该法案规定了国内对“统一规则的公平访问和合理使用数据”的执行框架，包括： 1、基本术语定义（数据控制者、数据使用者等）； 2、国内负责执行《数据法》的主管部门和监管机构的职责划分； 3、指定数据协调官、指定与监督合作及争议解决机制； 4、明确各类执法机构和监管当局在实施数据访问、共享、互操作等方面的职责； 5、确定对违反数据公平访问与使用义务的制裁和处罚机制； 6、修改现行《一般行政法》、《数据库法》、《消费者保护执行法》和《政府信息再利用法》等相关国内法律，以确保与欧盟数据法的一致性。 该法案的核心是使欧盟层面的数据治理规则在荷兰具有可执行性和制度保障，特别是在跨境和国内数据共享、监管协作和行政处罚方面提供本地法律基础。
results.englishSummary: The Act is Dutch national legislation adopted to implement the EU Data Act (Regulation (EU) 2023/2854) domestically. This Act provides the legal framework for enforcing the EU Data Act’s harmonised rules on fair access to and use of data. It defines key terms; establishes responsible national authorities and supervisory bodies; designates a data coordinator; sets out cooperation mechanisms among regulatory authorities; provides dispute resolution procedures; and specifies sanctioning powers for violations. It also amends existing Dutch laws — including the General Administrative Law Act, the Database Act, the Consumer Protection Enforcement Act and the Reuse of Public Sector Information Act — to ensure consistency with EU data governance objectives. The Act thus enables operational enforcement of the EU Data Act in the Netherlands.

results.title: S.I. No. 656/2025 - European Union (Motor Vehicle Type-Approval – Criteria for IO Approval and IO Employee Authorisation) Regulations 2025
results.localTitle: 2025 年欧盟（机动车辆类型认证 - IO 认证标准和 IO 员工授权）条例——实施欧盟2018/858号条例
results.summary: 该条例实施 Regulation (EU) 2018/858，具体规定独立运营商（IO）认证标准、人员授权条件及技术资格要求，在欧盟框架基础上提供更具体的审批与监督标准。
results.englishSummary: This law implements Regulation (EU) 2018/858 by specifying approval criteria for Independent Operators (IOs), employee authorisation conditions, and technical qualification requirements, thereby providing more detailed approval and supervision standards than the EU framework alone.
results.topicLabel: 交通管理与行业数据监管

results.title: Uitvoeringswet datagovernanceverordening
results.localTitle: 欧盟数据治理法实施法案
results.summary: 该法案实施 Regulation (EU) 2022/868，在荷兰指定数据中介服务与数据利他组织的监管主管机关，并规定登记程序、监督权、罚款标准及纠正措施，使欧盟条例的原则性义务在国家层面具有具体执行机制。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2022/868 (Data Governance Act) by designating the competent supervisory authority for data intermediation services and data altruism organisations in the Netherlands, and by establishing registration procedures, supervisory powers, fine levels, and corrective measures, thereby translating the Regulation’s principle-based obligations into concrete national enforcement mechanisms.

results.title: Regulation (EU) 2024/2847 of the European Parliament and of the Council (Cyber Resilience Act)(CRA)
results.localTitle: 《网络韧性法案》
results.issuer: 欧洲议会与欧盟理事会/European Parliament and the Council of the European Union
results.summary: 《网络安全法案》（Cyber Resilience Act, CRA）是欧盟针对带有数字元素产品的统一网络安全框架。它适用于在欧盟市场销售的任何具有直接或间接数据连接功能的软硬件产品（包括非连接设备），制造商、进口商和分销商均须遵守。该法案确立了产品的强制性网络安全要求，涵盖整个生命周期（从设计开发到停止支持），并规定了各经济运营商的义务，如进行符合性评估、记录漏洞、发布安全更新及主动报告事件。其核心机制包括通过统一标准和协调标准验证产品合规性、建立欧盟市场监管框架以及要求提供清晰的消费者安全信息。CRA的核心目的是提升投放欧盟市场产品的网络安全基线，保护消费者与基础设施，并增强数字产品供应链的透明性。
results.englishSummary: Cyber Resilience Act (CRA) is the EU's harmonized cybersecurity framework for products with digital elements. It applies to all hardware and software products sold on the EU market that have data connections, whether direct or indirect (including non-connected devices). Manufacturers, importers, and distributors must comply. The Act establishes mandatory cybersecurity requirements for products throughout their entire lifecycle—from design and development to end of support—and defines the obligations of economic operators, such as conducting conformity assessments, documenting vulnerabilities, issuing security updates, and actively reporting incidents. Its core mechanisms include verifying product compliance through harmonized standards, establishing an EU market surveillance framework, and requiring clear consumer security information. The primary aim of the CRA is to raise the cybersecurity baseline for products placed on the EU market, protect consumers and infrastructure, and enhance transparency and accountability in the digital product supply chain.

results.title: Förordning med kompletterande bestämmelser till EU:s förordning om digitala tjänster (2024:958)
results.localTitle: 欧盟数字服务条例的补充条款法案的实施条例（2024:958）
results.summary: 该条例细化DSA补充条款法案（2024:958）中的行政分工、信息通报与程序规则，从而增强国家监管执行的制度协调性。
results.englishSummary: This Ordinance details administrative division of tasks, notification procedures and coordination rules under the Swedish DSA Supplementary Act（2024:958）, thereby strengthening institutional coherence in national enforcement.

results.title: Avaliku teabe seadus
results.localTitle: 公共信息法
results.summary: 爱沙尼亚《公共信息法》规定公共部门信息的获取、公共信息的界定及公开程序，以国家法律层面落实开放数据和透明访问机制，并细化权利、义务、拒绝访问理由及执行程序。 欧盟法规实施： 间接支持欧盟《开放数据指令》（EU）2019/1024。 更具操作性补充： 该法律不仅执行开放信息的基本访问规则，还具体规定公共信息的重用、档案访问期限和透明度义务。
results.englishSummary: The Estonian Public Information Act sets out the access to public sector information, definitions and procedures for public disclosure as a national implementation of transparency principles, detailing rights, obligations, grounds for refusal, and enforcement processes. EU Regulation Implementation: Indirectly supports the EU Open Data Directive (EU) 2019/1024. More Operational Supplement: This law not only enforces basic access rules for open information but also specifically stipulates obligations regarding the reuse of public information, access periods for archives, and transparency.

results.title: Vyhláška č. 334/2025 Sb. Vyhláška o Portálu Národního úřadu pro kybernetickou a informační bezpečnost a požadavcích na některé úkony
results.localTitle: 第 334/2025 号法令 关于国家网络和信息安全办公室门户网站的法令以及某些行动的要求
results.issuer: 国家网络和信息安全办公室
results.summary: 该法令配套实施第 264/2025 号法案（网络安全法），规定通过国家网络和信息安全办公室门户进行报告、通知和信息提交的技术格式和程序要求，从而细化NIS2报告机制的操作规则。
results.englishSummary: This Decree complements the No. 264/2025 Act (Cybersecurity Act) by defining the technical formats and procedural requirements for reporting, notification and information submission via the National Cyber and Information Security Agency portal, thereby detailing the operational aspects of NIS2 reporting mechanisms.

results.title: Lei n.º 41/2004 Dados pessoais e protecção da privacidade no sector das comunicações electrónicas
results.localTitle: 第41/2004号法律-电子通信领域的个人数据和隐私保护 将EU 2002 年 7 月 12 日关于电子通信领域个人数据处理和隐私保护的第 2002/58/EC 号指令转化为国内法的法案
results.summary: 该法转化实施 Directive 2002/58/EC（电子隐私指令），规定电子通信领域的流量数据处理、营销通信规则及同意要求，并通过明确国家监管与处罚机制提供更具体的行业合规标准。
results.englishSummary: This Act transposes Directive 2002/58/EC (ePrivacy Directive) by regulating traffic data processing, marketing communications rules, and consent requirements in the electronic communications sector, and by establishing national supervisory and sanctioning mechanisms that provide more specific sectoral compliance standards.

results.title: NIS 2 A Quick Reference Guid
results.localTitle: NIS2快速参考指南
results.summary: 该指南解释 Directive (EU) 2022/2555（NIS2 指令） 的核心义务、适用范围及事件通报要求，并通过合规步骤说明、义务主体识别方法及风险管理清单提供比指令文本更具操作性的实施指引，在国家转化立法尚未完全细化前帮助组织理解和准备履行网络安全义务。
results.englishSummary: This guide explains the core obligations, scope, and incident reporting requirements under Directive (EU) 2022/2555 (NIS2 Directive), and by providing compliance steps, entity identification guidance, and risk management checklists, it offers a more operational implementation framework than the Directive text itself, assisting organisations in understanding and preparing for cybersecurity obligations pending full national transposition.

results.title: Wet beveiliging netwerk- en informatiesystemen（Wbni）
results.localTitle: 《网络与信息系统安全法案》
results.summary: 荷兰《网络与信息系统安全法案》（Wet beveiliging netwerk- en informatiesystemen, Wbni）是荷兰为落实欧盟第一版《网络与信息系统安全指令》（NIS1，Directive (EU) 2016/1148）而制定的国家网络安全基础法律，构建了对关键服务运营者和部分数字服务提供者的网络安全监管框架。该法要求相关主体采取适当且相称的技术与组织安全措施，以保障网络与信息系统的可用性、完整性和机密性，并在发生对服务连续性产生重大影响的安全事件时履行强制性通报义务，同时赋予主管机关监督和执法权限。在欧盟 NIS2 指令已生效但荷兰尚未完成国内转化的过渡阶段，Wbni 仍然是荷兰网络与信息系统安全领域的主要适用法律，实际承担“过渡性实施框架”的功能。但其适用范围、治理深度和管理层责任要求均低于 NIS2 标准，未来将由拟议中的《Cyberbeveiligingswet（网络安全法）》取代，以实现对 NIS2 更广泛主体覆盖、更严格风险管理和更高层级治理责任的要求。
results.englishSummary: The Dutch Network and Information Systems Security Act (Wet beveiliging netwerk- en informatiesystemen, Wbni) is the national cybersecurity framework law enacted by the Netherlands to implement the first EU Network and Information Security Directive (NIS1, Directive (EU) 2016/1148). It establishes a cybersecurity regulatory framework for operators of essential services and certain digital service providers. The Act requires relevant entities to adopt appropriate and proportionate technical and organizational security measures to ensure the availability, integrity, and confidentiality of network and information systems, and to fulfill mandatory notification obligations in the event of security incidents that have a significant impact on service continuity, while also granting supervisory and enforcement powers to competent authorities. During the transitional period in which the EU NIS2 Directive has entered into force but has not yet been fully transposed into Dutch law, the Wbni remains the primary applicable law in the field of network and information systems security in the Netherlands and effectively serves as a “transitional implementation framework.” However, its scope of application, governance depth, and management accountability requirements are all lower than the NIS2 standard. It is expected to be replaced in the future by the proposed Cyberbeveiligingswet (Cybersecurity Act) in order to achieve broader entity coverage, stricter risk management, and higher-level governance accountability in line with NIS2 requirements.

results.title: Verordnung über die Ahndung von Zuwiderhandlungen gegen EU-Typgenehmigungsvorschriften
results.localTitle: 《关于起诉违反欧盟型式认证法行为的条例》
results.referenceNo: (BGBl. 2023 I Nr. 78)——联邦法律公报2023年第1期第78号
results.issuer: 联邦数字事务和交通部（Bundesministerium für Digitales und Verkehr）
results.summary: 德国《关于起诉违反欧盟型式认证法规行为的条例》规定了对违反欧盟机动车型式认证法规的行为进行制裁的具体行政处罚规则，包括违法使用非法测试装置、提供虚假信息等情形的处罚范围和罚金标准；该条例是对欧盟 Regulation (EU) 2018/858 等车辆型式批准法规要求成员国设定“有效、相称和威慑性处罚措施”的国内落地实施，在德国构建起更严格的处罚机制，使得对于型式认证违法行为的罚金上限和执行力度明显高于过去较低标准，有助于确保制造商、经销商等行为者遵守欧盟统一型式批准制度。
results.englishSummary: The German Regulation on the prosecution of infringements against EU type-approval provisions establishes specific administrative sanctions and penalty rules for breaches of the EU vehicle type approval regime, including illegal defeat devices, false information, and other non-conformity actions. It implements the EU Regulation (EU) 2018/858 requirement for Member States to impose effective, proportionate, and deterrent penalties, setting higher fine ceilings and concrete enforcement mechanisms in Germany than previously existed, thereby strengthening compliance with the EU type approval framework.
results.topicLabel: 交通管理与行业数据监管

results.title: Lei n.º 46/2012, de 29 de agosto Dados pessoais e protecção da privacidade no sector das comunicações electrónicas
results.localTitle: 2012年8月29日第46/2012号法律 （将欧盟2009/136/EC 号指令转化为国内法）
results.summary: 该法转化实施 Directive 2009/136/EC（对电子通信监管框架的修订指令），强化Cookies同意机制和安全漏洞通报义务，并细化运营商通知与罚款程序，从而在欧盟框架下设定更严格和更具体的电子隐私合规要求。
results.englishSummary: This Act transposes Directive 2009/136/EC (amending the electronic communications regulatory framework) by strengthening cookie consent mechanisms and security breach notification obligations, and by detailing operator notification and fine procedures, thereby establishing stricter and more specific ePrivacy compliance requirements within the EU framework.

results.title: 2024. évi LXIX. törvény a Magyarország kiberbiztonságáról
results.localTitle: 2024 年第 LXIX 号法案，关于匈牙利网络安全（匈牙利20224年网络安全法）
results.summary: 该法实施 Directive (EU) 2022/2555（NIS2 指令），界定关键和重要实体范围，规定强制性风险管理措施、报告时限及国家监督机制，并在若干领域设定更明确的合规期限与行政罚款标准，从而提供比指令文本更具体且在部分情形下更严格的国家安全义务框架。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Directive (EU) 2022/2555 (NIS2 Directive) by defining the scope of essential and important entities, establishing mandatory risk management measures, reporting deadlines, and national supervisory mechanisms, and by setting clearer compliance timelines and administrative fine levels in certain areas, thereby providing a more specific and in some cases stricter national cybersecurity framework than the Directive text alone.

results.title: EDPB Guidelines 2/2023 on Technical Scope of Art. 5(3) of ePrivacy Directive
results.localTitle: EDPB 《关于 ePrivacy 指令第5(3)条技术适用范围的指南》
results.issuer: 欧洲数据保护委员会（European Data Protection Board, EDPB）
results.summary: 指南界定 ePrivacy 指令第5(3)条的 技术范围：访问/存储终端设备信息的含义。 解析何种技术行为需征得有效同意（如 cookie、脚本行为、设备标识等），并提示 transient storage 也可能触发要求。
results.englishSummary: Guidelines： Clarifies the technical scope of Article 5(3) of the ePrivacy Directive, which requires consent for access to or storage of information on end‑user equipment. Elaborates definitions of “access”, “storage”, “terminal equipment”, including transient and persistent storage. Provides interpretation of technical operations falling within scope (e.g., scripts, cookies, device identifiers) and how they interact with consent requirements.

results.title: S.I. No. 117/2024 - European Union (Contestable and Fair Markets in the Digital Sector) Regulations 2024
results.localTitle: 第 117/2024 号法令——实施2024 年欧盟（数字领域可竞争和公平市场）条例
results.summary: 该条例实施 Regulation (EU) 2022/1925（数字市场法），指定国家主管机关并规定调查协助权、行政处罚程序及与欧盟委员会的合作机制，从而在欧盟委员会主导执法框架下提供国家层面的程序性与制裁性补充。
results.englishSummary: This law implements Regulation (EU) 2022/1925 (Digital Markets Act) by designating the national competent authority and establishing investigative assistance powers, administrative sanction procedures, and cooperation mechanisms with the European Commission, thereby providing national procedural and sanctioning supplements within the Commission-led enforcement framework.

results.title: Zákon č. 110/2019 Sb. Zákon o zpracování osobních údajů
results.localTitle: 第 110/2019 号法案个人数据处理法（合并最新版）
results.summary: 该法实施 Regulation (EU) 2016/679（GDPR） 并转化 Directive (EU) 2016/680，通过规定捷克数据保护局的权限、行政罚款适用规则、公共机构和新闻科研领域的例外以及特定国家识别号处理限制，从而在GDPR直接适用基础上提供更具操作性的执法和国家例外框架。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and transposes Directive (EU) 2016/680 by defining the powers of the Czech Data Protection Authority, rules on administrative fines, exemptions for public authorities and journalism/research, and restrictions on processing national identification numbers, thereby providing a more operational enforcement and national exemption framework alongside the directly applicable GDPR.

results.title: Ustawa z dnia 25 czerwca 2025 r. o krajowym systemie certyfikacji cyberbezpieczeństwa
results.localTitle: 2025年6月25日关于国家网络安全认证体系的法案
results.summary: 该法实施 Regulation (EU) 2019/881（欧盟网络安全法/ENISA条例），建立国家网络安全认证机构和合格评定程序，并规定监督、吊销认证及罚款机制，从而在欧盟框架下提供更具体的认证实施与执法细则。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2019/881 (EU Cybersecurity Act/ENISA Regulation) by establishing a national cybersecurity certification authority and conformity assessment procedures, and by setting supervisory, certification withdrawal, and fine mechanisms, thereby providing more detailed certification implementation and enforcement rules within the EU framework.

results.title: Regulation (EU) 2018/858 of the European Parliament and of the Council (EU)2018/858
results.localTitle: 《关于对机动车及其挂车和应用于车辆的系统、部件、单独技术单元的批准和市场监督的欧盟议会和欧盟理事会法规》
results.issuer: 欧洲议会与欧盟理事会/European Parliament and the Council of the European Union
results.summary: 《关于对机动车及其挂车和应用于车辆的系统、部件、单独技术单元的批准和市场监督的欧盟议会和欧盟理事会法规》是欧盟统一的车辆准入与监管框架。它适用于所有在欧盟市场销售或投入使用的机动车、挂车及其相关系统、部件和技术单元。该法规确立了车辆型式批准的强制要求，明确制造商、进口商等经济运营商的义务，并规定了通过技术文件评估、测试和符合性认证等程序获得市场准入的依据。法规重点关注市场监督机制（包括成员国监管机构的后市场检查、不合格产品召回等）以及车辆全生命周期合规性，其核心目的是保障车辆安全、环保与技术一致性，确保欧盟内部市场流通的车辆符合统一标准并保护用户与公众利益。
results.englishSummary: The Regulation of the European Parliament and of the Council on the approval and market surveillance of motor vehicles and their trailers, and of systems, components and separate technical units intended for such vehicles is the EU's harmonized framework for vehicle access and supervision. It applies to all motor vehicles, trailers, and their related systems, components, and technical units sold or put into service within the EU market. The regulation establishes mandatory requirements for type approval, defines the obligations of economic operators (such as manufacturers and importers), and sets out the basis for market access through procedures like technical documentation assessment, testing, and conformity certification. It focuses on market surveillance mechanisms (including post-market checks by national authorities and recalls of non-compliant products) and ensuring whole-lifecycle compliance. Its core objectives are to guarantee vehicle safety, environmental protection, and technical coherence, ensuring vehicles circulating in the internal market meet uniform standards and protecting user and public interests.

results.title: Uitvoeringswet digitalemarktenverordening
results.localTitle: 数字市场监管实施法案
results.summary: 该法案实施 Regulation (EU) 2022/1925，明确荷兰竞争主管机关在国家层面的配合职责及信息交换机制，并细化调查协助程序与行政执行措施，在不改变欧盟委员会核心执法权的前提下提供国家层面的程序性补充。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2022/1925 (Digital Markets Act) by defining the supporting role and information-sharing mechanisms of the Dutch competition authority at national level, and by detailing procedures for investigative assistance and administrative enforcement measures, thereby providing procedural supplements without altering the European Commission’s primary enforcement powers.

results.title: Vyhláška č. 409/2025 Sb. Vyhláška o bezpečnostních opatřeních poskytovatele regulované služby v režimu vyšších povinností
results.localTitle: 第 409/2025 号法令 关于受监管服务提供商在更高义务制度下的安全措施的法令
results.issuer: 国家网络和信息安全办公室
results.summary: 该法令落实NIS2对高风险或关键实体的要求，规定更严格的技术和组织安全措施、治理结构和审计义务，从而在指令最低要求基础上设定更高层级的国家安全标准。
results.englishSummary: This Decree implements NIS2 requirements for high-risk or essential entities by prescribing stricter technical and organizational security measures, governance structures and audit obligations, thereby setting higher national security standards beyond the Directive’s minimum requirements.

results.title: Data Protection Authority of Belgium Artificial Intelligence Systems and the GDPR A Data Protection Perspective
results.localTitle: Belgian DPA关于人工智能和GDPR的指南
results.issuer: 比利时数据保护局（Belgian DPA）
results.summary: 该指南解释 Regulation (EU) 2016/679（GDPR） 在人工智能系统中的适用方式，具体说明数据最小化、透明度、自动化决策限制和数据保护影响评估等义务的实践标准，从而提供比欧盟法规文本更具操作性的合规分析框架，但未设定超出 GDPR 的实体义务。
results.englishSummary: This guidance explains the application of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation) to artificial intelligence systems, detailing practical standards for data minimisation, transparency, restrictions on automated decision-making, and data protection impact assessments, thereby providing a more operational compliance framework than the EU Regulation text itself, without creating substantive obligations beyond the GDPR.
results.topicLabel: 人工智能与新技术治理

results.title: Les fiches pratiques IA
results.localTitle: CNIL的人工智能操作指南
results.issuer: 法国政府（Gouvernement）：国家信息与自由委员会Commission nationale de l’informatique et des libertés（CNIL）
results.summary: 这是一系列由法国数据保护监管机构 CNIL 编制的实用操作指南，旨在帮助组织在应用人工智能系统时遵守数据保护义务和《欧盟人工智能法》，核心包括： 风险评估与治理流程：如何界定 AI 系统中的数据保护风险（如高风险场景识别） 数据主体权利保障：如何确保 AI 系统尊重访问、更正、删除、反对处理等权利 透明度 & 可解释性：如何向用户解释 AI 的逻辑与处理机制 最小化与安全性措施：如何实施数据最小化、隐私设计（Privacy by Design）、安全控制等； 文档化与问责机制：如何建立合规记录、内部治理与问责责任链 评估与监测机制：如何持续监测模型性能、偏见与风险变化 因为《欧盟人工智能法案（AI Act）》尚在协商与逐步实施阶段，CNIL 提供这些“操作指引”，帮助组织提前理解 AI 法案下的原则性要求，以及如何在现有《GDPR》和相关数据保护框架下应用 AI。
results.englishSummary: This is a series of practical operational guidance documents issued by the French data protection supervisory authority, the CNIL, intended to assist organizations in complying with data protection obligations and the EU Artificial Intelligence Act when deploying AI systems. The core elements include: Risk assessment and governance processes: how to identify and assess data protection risks arising from AI systems (including the identification of high-risk scenarios); Protection of data subject rights: how to ensure that AI systems respect rights of access, rectification, erasure, and objection to processing; Transparency and explainability: how to provide meaningful information to users regarding the logic and functioning of AI systems; Data minimisation and security measures: how to implement data minimisation, privacy by design, and appropriate technical and organisational safeguards; Documentation and accountability mechanisms: how to establish compliance records, internal governance structures, and clear lines of responsibility; Evaluation and monitoring mechanisms: how to continuously monitor model performance, bias, and evolving risks. As the EU Artificial Intelligence Act (AI Act) is still in the process of phased implementation, CNIL has issued these operational guidelines to help organizations anticipate and understand the Act’s principle-based requirements, and to facilitate the lawful deployment of AI systems within the existing framework of the GDPR and related data protection legislation.
results.topicLabel: 人工智能与新技术治理

results.title: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council (NIS 2 Directive)
results.localTitle: 《网络与信息安全指令》
results.issuer: 欧洲议会与欧盟理事会/European Parliament and the Council of the European Union
results.summary: 《网络与信息安全指令》（NIS 2 Directive）是欧盟统一的网络安全风险管理和事件报告框架，适用于包括关键实体（如能源、交通、金融、数字基础设施）及重要实体（如公共管理、邮政、食品、制造业等）在内的广泛行业。该指令确立了统一的网络安全基线要求（如风险管理、事件处理、供应链安全）与强制性事件报告义务，强化了成员国监管机构的监督与执行权力，并要求建立跨境协作的网络危机联络组织网络。其核心机制包括通过协调的监督与处罚、统一的信息共享以及强化管理层责任来提升欧盟网络安全。NIS 2旨在弥合原NIS指令的实施差异，增强关键经济与社会部门的整体网络安全防护与协同响应能力，构建欧盟统一的数字安全屏障。
results.englishSummary: The Directive on Measures for a High Common Level of Cybersecurity Across the Union (NIS 2 Directive) is the EU's harmonized framework for cybersecurity risk management and incident reporting. It applies to a wide range of sectors, including both critical entities (such as energy, transport, finance, and digital infrastructure) and important entities (such as public administration, postal services, food, and manufacturing). The directive establishes unified baseline cybersecurity requirements (e.g., risk management, incident handling, supply chain security) and mandatory incident reporting obligations. It strengthens the supervisory and enforcement powers of national competent authorities and mandates the establishment of a coordinated Cyber Crisis Liaison Organization Network (CyCLONe) for cross-border collaboration. Core mechanisms include harmonized supervision and penalties, coordinated information sharing, and enhanced management accountability. The primary aim of NIS 2 is to close implementation gaps from the original NIS Directive, elevate the overall cybersecurity resilience and coordinated response capabilities of key economic and social sectors, and build a unified EU digital security front.

results.title: Produktsäkerhetslag (2004:451 to 2022:451)
results.summary: 该法原实施 Directive 2001/95/EC，并与新生效的 Regulation (EU) 2023/988（GPSR） 相衔接，通过规定市场监督、召回和行政责任机制，在欧盟产品安全制度下形成国家执法框架。
results.englishSummary: This Act originally implemented Directive 2001/95/EC and now operates in conjunction with Regulation (EU) 2023/988 (General Product Safety Regulation), establishing market surveillance, recall and administrative liability mechanisms, thereby forming the national enforcement framework within the EU product safety regime.

results.title: Act on Making Products Available on the Market (ProdSG)
results.localTitle: 产品安全法
results.issuer: 德国联邦议院（Deutscher Bundestag）和联邦参议院（Bundesrat）
results.summary: 德国《产品安全法》规定所有在德国市场上提供的产品的安全要求及相关市场义务，包括制造商、进口商、分销商和履约服务者的信息义务、标签要求与风险披露；该法在商品供应链责任和市场监督方面具体实施欧盟的一般产品安全框架，并引入履约服务者义务与更广泛的风险评估要求，使国内产品市场规则更加细化和可操作。
results.englishSummary: The German Act on Making Products Available on the Market (ProdSG) sets out safety requirements and market obligations for products made available in Germany, including information, labeling, and risk disclosure duties for manufacturers, importers, distributors, and fulfilment service providers; it implements the EU general product safety framework and introduces specific obligations on fulfilment service providers and broader risk assessment duties, making market rules more detailed and operational.

results.title: Lov om supplerende bestemmelser til Europa-Parlamentets og Rådets forordning om digitale markeder

results.englishSummary: This Act supplements Regulation (EU) 2022/1925 (Digital Markets Act) by defining the assistance and information-exchange powers of the national competition authority, thereby providing more specific procedural enforcement rules within the EU Regulation framework.

results.title: Decreto-Lei n.º 125/2025, de 4 de dezembro Transpõe a Diretiva (UE) 2022/2555, relativa a medidas destinadas a garantir um elevado nível comum de cibersegurança na União

results.summary: 该法令转化实施 Directive (EU) 2022/2555（NIS2 指令），界定关键与重要实体范围、规定强制风险管理与报告时限，并赋予国家主管机关监督和处罚权，从而在部分领域设定更明确的技术与组织措施及罚款标准。
results.englishSummary: This Decree-Law transposes Directive (EU) 2022/2555 (NIS2 Directive) by defining essential and important entities, establishing mandatory risk management and reporting deadlines, and granting supervisory and sanctioning powers to national authorities, thereby setting clearer technical and organizational measures and fine levels in certain areas.

results.title: Regulation (EU) 2019/881 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 17 April 2019 on ENISA (the European Union Agency for Cybersecurity) and on information and communications technology cybersecurity certification and repealing Regulation (EU) No 526/2013 (Cybersecurity Act)
results.localTitle: 关于 ENISA（欧盟网络安全局）和信息与通信技术网络安全认证的 (EU) 2019/881 号条例（网络安全法）

results.englishSummary: This regulation strengthens ENISA’s mandate and establishes an EU-wide cybersecurity certification framework for ICT products and services to enhance cybersecurity, resilience and trust while avoiding fragmentation of market certification schemes.

results.title: Auto, mootorratta, mopeedi ja nende haagiste tüübikinnituse, üksiksõiduki kinnituse ja ümberehituse tingimused, nõuded ja kord
results.localTitle: 汽车、摩托车、轻便摩托车及其拖车的型式认证、单车认证和改装的条件、要求和程序

results.englishSummary: This law implements EU vehicle type approval regulations such as Regulation (EU) 2018/858, stipulating the procedures for type approval, individual permits, and modifications of vehicles, motorcycles, and their trailers. It implements the EU vehicle type approval system and details the national approval process, technical documentation requirements, and specific permit conditions. results.title: Act governing the use of public sector data (Data Use Act – DUA)
results.localTitle: 数据使用法
results.issuer: 德国联邦议院（Deutscher Bundestag）和联邦参议院（Bundesrat）
results.summary: 德国《公共部门数据使用法》（Data Use Act – DUA）旨在规范联邦公共部门数据的开放与可再利用，促进数据的可访问性与再利用，并进一步明确数据发布与交换的法律框架；与欧盟《开放数据与重用指令》相比，该法赋予行政机关更具体的操作性义务、服务者责任和数据类型分类要求，并强调数据质量、机器可读性和跨部门共享原则。
results.englishSummary: The German Data Use Act (DUA) establishes a legal framework for the publication and reuse of public sector data at the federal level, enhancing accessibility and reuse of datasets and clarifying obligations on authorities regarding data provision and exchange; compared with the EU Open Data Directive, it includes more concrete obligations for authorities, specific data quality requirements, machine-readable formats, and cross-sector data-sharing principles.

results.summary: 该法实施 Directive (EU) 2022/2555（NIS2 指令），界定关键与重要实体、设定强制风险管理与事件报告时限，并赋予国家主管机关调查和罚款权力，从而在国家层面建立更具体且在某些方面更严格的合规与监督机制。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Directive (EU) 2022/2555 (NIS2 Directive) by defining essential and important entities, establishing mandatory risk management and incident reporting deadlines, and granting investigative and fining powers to national authorities, thereby creating a more specific and in certain respects stricter national compliance and supervisory regime.

results.englishSummary: This Government Decree implements Act LXXV of 2025 (AI Act implementation) by further detailing registration procedures, compliance reporting formats, and inter-agency coordination mechanisms, thereby providing more concrete administrative operational rules for AI supervision.

results.title: Zákon č. 127/2005 Sb. Zákon o elektronických komunikacích a o změně některých souvisejících zákonů (zákon o elektronických komunikacích)
results.localTitle: 第 127/2005 号法案 电子通信法及相关法律修正案（电子通信法）
results.summary: 该法实施 Directive (EU) 2018/1972（EECC） 及 Directive 2002/58/EC，规定网络与服务安全义务、流量和位置数据处理规则、用户隐私保护和监管处罚机制，从而在欧盟框架下建立更具体的国家电子通信与数据保护制度。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Directive (EU) 2018/1972 (EECC) and Directive 2002/58/EC by establishing security obligations for networks and services, rules on traffic and location data processing, user privacy protections and regulatory sanction mechanisms, thereby creating a more detailed national electronic communications and data protection regime within the EU framework.

results.title: （EG -Fahrzeuggenehmigungsverordnung）/Regulation on EC type approval for motor vehicles and their trailers and for systems, components and separate technical units for these vehicles*) (EC Vehicle Type Approval Regulation - EC-FGV)
results.localTitle: 德国关于机动车辆及其拖车以及这些车辆的系统、部件和独立技术单元的欧盟型式认证的规定*)（欧盟车辆型式认证规定 - EC-FGV）
results.referenceNo: (BGBl. I S. 126)——联邦法律公报I第126页
results.issuer: 联邦交通、建设和城市发展部，联邦环境、自然保护和核安全部和联邦内政部
results.summary: 该法规是德国为在国内实施欧盟关于机动车型式批准的统一框架而制定的法规，涵盖车辆、拖车及其关键系统/部件的型式批准程序和一致性要求；该法规在德国范围内指定主管机关（如 Kraftfahrt-Bundesamt）负责受理、审核和监督型式认证申请，并规定证书一致性证明（Certificate of Conformity）等义务。该法规细化了国内实施细节和程序性要求（例如向 KBA 通报生产变更、认证更新时的通知义务），使欧盟型式认证制度在德国实际运作时具有可执行性。
results.englishSummary: The EC-FGV implemen ailers, and key systems/components and ensuring conformity assessments. It designates the competent authority (notably the Kraftfahrt-Bundesamt) to process, review, and supervise type-approval applications and mandates issuance of Certificates of Conformity, as well as notifications of production changes or approval updates. While aligned with the EU requiremengts, the EC-FGV adds specific procedural rules and domestic enforcement mechanisms that make the EU type-approval regime operable within Germany.
