results.title: Bundesdatenschutzgesetz /Federal Data Protection Act (BDSG)
results.localTitle: 联邦数据保护法
results.referenceNo: BGBl. I S. 2097（即2017年《联邦法律公报》第 I 部第44号，第 2097 页）
results.issuer: 德国联邦议院（Deutscher Bundestag）和联邦参议院（Bundesrat）
results.summary: 德国《联邦数据保护法》（BDSG）是在 GDPR 框架下的配套与细化立法，主要在 GDPR 允许成员国自行规定的领域提供更具操作性的规则：一是对雇员数据处理作出专门规定（如以劳动关系必要性、集体协议为依据），成为企业人力资源合规的重要法律基础；二是细化科研、统计、档案目的处理的条件与保障措施；三是对信用评估与评分（scoring）设定更具体的合法性与透明度要求；四是通过限制条款在特定情形下限制数据主体权利（如为公共安全、执法、国家安全或保护商业秘密）；五是对视频监控在公共可进入场所的使用提出条件；六是规定数据保护官（DPO）任命门槛与地位（在德国实践中通常较 GDPR 更严格、适用更广）；并明确联邦与州监管机构的分工以及刑事与行政责任。整体上，BDSG 不替代 GDPR，而是在其框架内提供本地化、可操作的合规标准，部分领域对控制者提出了更具体或更严格的要求。
results.englishSummary: The German Federal Data Protection Act (BDSG) complements and specifies the GDPR by setting more operational rules in areas where Member States have discretion. It (i) provides a dedicated legal basis for employee data processing (e.g., necessity for employment purposes or collective agreements), which is central to HR compliance; (ii) details conditions and safeguards for processing for scientific research, statistics, and archiving; (iii) imposes more specific legality and transparency requirements for creditworthiness assessments and scoring; (iv) allows restrictions on data subject rights in defined cases (e.g., public security, law enforcement, national security, or protection of trade secrets); (v) sets conditions for video surveillance in publicly accessible areas; and (vi) defines DPO appointment thresholds and status, which in practice are often stricter and broader in Germany than the GDPR baseline. It also clarifies the allocation of powers among supervisory authorities and provides for criminal and administrative liability. Overall, the BDSG does not replace the GDPR but localizes it with practical compliance standards, sometimes imposing more specific or stricter obligations on controllers.

results.title: 21 AVRIL 2024. - Loi mettant en oeuvre le règlement (UE) 2022/2065 du Parlement européen et du Conseil du 19 octobre 2022 relatif à un marché unique des services numériques et modifiant la directive 2000/31/CE, portant modifications du livre XII et du livre XV du Code de droit économique et portant modifications de la loi du 17 janvier 2003 relative au statut du régulateur des secteurs des postes et des télécommunications belges
results.localTitle: （欧盟数字服务法实施法）2024 年4 月 21 日-实施欧洲议会和理事会2022 年 10 月 19日关于数字服务单一市场和修订指令 2000/31/EC的(EU) 2022/2065 号条例的法律（修订经济法典第十二卷和第十五卷，并修订2003 年 1 月 17日关于比利时邮政和电信行业监管机构 地位的法律）
results.summary: 该法律实施 Regulation (EU) 2022/2065（数字服务法），通过修订《经济法典》第十二卷和第十五卷并调整电信监管机构法律地位，指定国家数字服务协调员及主管机关，明确调查权、行政罚款标准和执法程序，从而在欧盟条例直接适用基础上建立完整且更具操作性的国家监督与制裁体系。
results.englishSummary: This Law implements Regulation (EU) 2022/2065 (Digital Services Act) by amending Books XII and XV of the Code of Economic Law and modifying the legal status of the telecommunications regulator, designating the national Digital Services Coordinator and competent authorities, and defining investigative powers, administrative fine levels, and enforcement procedures, thereby establishing a comprehensive and more operational national supervisory and sanctioning framework alongside the directly applicable EU Regulation.

results.title: Code de la route
results.localTitle: 交通道路法规
results.referenceNo: 现代整合版以 LEGITEXT000006074228 为汇编编号
results.issuer: 法国议会（Parlement français）和法国政府（Gouvernement）
results.summary: 法国《道路交通法典》确立道路交通管理、车辆登记、驾驶许可、事故责任及交通违法处罚的国家法律框架，并实施现行 Regulation (EU) 2018/858（欧盟整车型式批准条例） 所确立的车辆型式批准制度，要求车辆在登记和上路前取得有效型式批准；同时通过具体的国家登记程序、执法规则及处罚机制，对欧盟制度作出更具操作性的补充规定。 该法规结合立法部分与条例部分，通过不断修订吸纳最新道路安全与交通发展需求，并可通过 Journal Officiel 的修正令更新。
results.englishSummary: The French Code de la route establishes the national legal framework governing road traffic management, vehicle registration, driving licences, civil liability for traffic accidents, and sanctions for traffic offences, and implements the vehicle type-approval system laid down in Regulation (EU) 2018/858 (EU Whole Vehicle Type-Approval Regulation), requiring vehicles to obtain a valid type approval prior to registration and entry into service; it further supplements the EU regime through detailed national registration procedures, enforcement rules, and penalty mechanisms, thereby ensuring its operational application in France. The Code combines legislative provisions and regulatory provisions, is regularly amended to reflect developments in road safety and transport policy, and may be updated through amending instruments published in the Journal Officiel.
results.topicLabel: 交通管理与行业数据监管

results.title: Directive 2009/136/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council of 25 November 2009 amending Directive 2002/22/EC on universal service and users' rights relating to electronic communications networks and services, Directive 2002/58/EC concerning the processing of personal data and the protection of privacy in the electronic communications sector and Regulation (EC) No 2006/2004 on cooperation between national authorities responsible for the enforcement of consumer protection laws
results.localTitle: 欧洲议会和理事会 2009 年 11 月 25 日关于修订关于电子通信网络和服务普遍服务和用户权利的指令 2002/22/EC、关于电子通信领域个人数据处理和隐私保护的指令 2002/58/EC 以及关于负责执行消费者保护法的国家主管机关之间合作的条例 (EC) No 2006/2004 的第 2009/136/EC 号指令
results.issuer: 欧洲议会与欧盟理事会/European Parliament and the Council of the European Union
results.summary: 本指令作为对2002/58/EC等指令的修改，针对电子通信服务的普遍服务义务、用户权利及隐私规则进行了技术和权利层面的更新，特别强化cookie和类似追踪技术使用前的明示同意要求，并在电信用户权利保障层面予以调整。
results.englishSummary: This amending directive updates privacy and electronic communications rules, strengthening prior consent for cookies and adjusting user rights and universal service provisions in line with technological and market developments.

results.title: Decreto-Lei n.º 2/2025, de 23 de janeiro
results.localTitle: 2025年1月23日第2/2025号法令（实施欧盟第2022/868 号条例数据治理法的葡萄牙国内法）
results.summary: 该法令实施 Regulation (EU) 2022/868（数据治理法），指定国家主管机关并规定数据中介服务注册、监督和罚款程序，从而在欧盟条例直接适用基础上建立更具操作性的国家执行机制。
results.englishSummary: This Decree-Law implements Regulation (EU) 2022/868 (Data Governance Act) by designating national competent authorities and establishing registration, supervision, and fine procedures for data intermediation services, thereby creating a more operational national enforcement mechanism alongside the directly applicable EU Regulation.

results.title: NOMOΣ ΥΠ’ ΑΡΙΘΜ. 4961 Αναδυόμενες τεχνολογίες πληροφορικής και επι- κοινωνιών, ενίσχυση της ψηφιακής διακυβέρνη- σης και άλλες διατάξεις.
results.localTitle: 第 4961/2022 号关于新兴信息和通信技术、加强数字治理及其他规定的法律
results.summary: 该法律在促进新兴信息与通信技术及数字治理方面补充并配合包括 GDPR、电子通信指令及其他欧盟数字市场规则的适用，规定促进创新及数据利用的国家政策、监管协调机制和某些行业执行细则，从而在欧盟框架下设定更具体的国家层面指导性原则。
results.englishSummary: This Act, in promoting emerging information and communication technologies and digital governance, complements and supports the application of GDPR, the ePrivacy Directive, and other EU digital market rules by setting national policies, regulatory coordination mechanisms, and certain sectoral implementation details for innovation and data utilization, thereby creating more specific national-level guiding principles within the EU framework.

results.title: Lag (2024:954) med kompletterande bestämmelser till EU:s förordning om digitala tjänster
results.localTitle: 欧盟数字服务条例的补充条款法案（2024:954）
results.summary: 该法案补充实施 Regulation (EU) 2022/2065（DSA），指定瑞典数字服务协调员并规定调查措施、罚款程序及跨境协作规则，从而在DSA直接适用基础上建立国家执法结构。
results.englishSummary: This Act supplements Regulation (EU) 2022/2065 (Digital Services Act) by designating the Swedish Digital Services Coordinator and regulating investigative measures, fine procedures and cross-border cooperation rules, thereby establishing a national enforcement structure alongside the directly applicable DSA.

results.title: Portugal AMA guide for transparent and responsible AI
results.localTitle: 葡萄牙关于透明和负责任的人工智能的指南
results.summary: 该指南旨在帮助葡萄牙公共部门和组织理解 Regulation (EU) 2024/1689（欧盟人工智能法） 的合规要求，通过提供从问卷式自评工具到透明度、可解释性、风险评估、责任归属、治理结构和利益相关方沟通等实操性章节，将 AI 法案中的原则性义务转化为具体的步骤、示例和检查清单，从而在欧盟规则的框架下为组织提供比法规文本更具操作性、可执行的合规指导。
results.englishSummary: This guide is designed to assist Portuguese public sector bodies and organisations in understanding the compliance requirements of Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 (Artificial Intelligence Act) by providing a practical framework—including a self-assessment questionnaire, and detailed sections on transparency, explainability, risk assessment, accountability, governance structures, and stakeholder communication—that translates the principle-based obligations of the AI Act into concrete steps, examples, and checklists, thereby offering a more operational and actionable compliance guide within the EU regulatory framework.
results.topicLabel: 人工智能与新技术治理

results.title: Lei n.º 58/2019, de 8 de agosto
results.localTitle: 2019年8月8日第58/2019号法律（欧盟通用数据保护条例的执行法律）
results.summary: 该法实施 Regulation (EU) 2016/679（GDPR），规定葡萄牙数据保护机构（CNPD）的权限、行政处罚和程序规则，并对公共部门数据处理及劳动关系中的数据处理设定更具体限制，从而在欧盟条例直接适用基础上建立更具操作性的国家执法与制裁框架。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation) by defining the powers, administrative sanctions, and procedural rules of the Portuguese Data Protection Authority (CNPD), and by setting more specific restrictions for public-sector processing and employment-related data processing, thereby creating a more operational national enforcement and sanctioning framework alongside the directly applicable EU Regulation.

results.title: S.I. No. 201/2024 - European Union (Road Vehicles: Type - Approval and Market Surveillance) (Amendment) Regulations 2024
results.localTitle: 第 201/2024 号法令——2024 年欧盟（道路车辆：类型认证和市场监管）（修订）条例
results.summary: 该修订条例实施 Regulation (EU) 2018/858 并调整国家市场监督和执法权限，以确保与欧盟车辆型式批准和市场监管制度保持一致，同时细化国内执行程序。
results.englishSummary: This amending Regulation implements Regulation (EU) 2018/858 by adjusting national market surveillance and enforcement powers to ensure alignment with the EU vehicle type-approval and market surveillance system, while further detailing domestic procedural rules.
results.topicLabel: 交通管理与行业数据监管

results.title: S.I. No. 366/2025 - European Union (Artificial Intelligence) (Designation) Regulations 2025
results.localTitle: 第366/2025号法令-——2025 年欧盟（人工智能）（指定）条例
results.issuer: 企业、 旅游和就业部
results.summary: 该条例实施 Regulation (EU) 2024/1689（AI 法），正式指定国家主管机关及市场监督机构，并明确调查权、合规检查与处罚权限，使欧盟人工智能法在爱尔兰具有具体执法路径。
results.englishSummary: This law implements Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 (AI Act) by formally designating the national competent authority and market surveillance authority, and by defining investigative powers, compliance inspections, and sanctioning authority, thereby providing a concrete enforcement pathway for the AI Act in Ireland.
results.topicLabel: 人工智能与新技术治理

results.title: German Digital Services Law (DDG)
results.localTitle: 数据服务法
results.referenceNo: (BGBl. 2024 I Nr. 149) (DDG)，（2024年联邦法律公报第149号）
results.issuer: 德国联邦议院（Deutscher Bundestag）和联邦参议院（Bundesrat）
results.summary: 德国《数字服务法》（DDG）是国家层面实施欧盟《数字服务法》（DSA）的立法，将欧盟直接适用的数字中介服务规则具体化为德国国内义务、执法与监督体系，指定联邦网络局（Bundesnetzagentur）作为数字服务协调机构，并规定国家层面的执行措施和处罚机制；相对欧盟母法，该法在机构指定、投诉处理、透明度报告等方面作出操作性规定以保障执行一致性。
results.englishSummary: The German Digital Services Law (DDG) is the national implementing act for the EU Digital Services Act (DSA), translating the EU’s directly applicable digital intermediary service mandates into obligations, enforcement, and supervisory structures in Germany, designating the Federal Network Agency as the national Digital Services Coordinator and setting out penalties and complaint mechanisms; compared with the EU regulation alone, it provides operational provisions on authorities, enforcement, and transparency.

results.title: Act Accompanying the DSA (DSA_x0002_Begleitgesetz)
results.localTitle: 《欧盟数据服务法案》配套法（核心奥地利《数字服务协调员法案》） ("DSA-BegG")
results.summary: 该法实施 Regulation (EU) 2022/2065（数字服务法），设立奥地利数字服务协调员并明确跨机构执法权限，同时通过修订通信、电子商务、媒体、刑事诉讼等多部法律规定程序衔接和罚款执行机制，从而在欧盟条例基础上提供更具体的行政与司法实施规则。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Regulation (EU) 2022/2065 (Digital Services Act) by establishing the Austrian Digital Services Coordinator and defining cross-agency enforcement powers, and by amending communications, e-commerce, media, and criminal procedure laws to provide procedural coordination and fine enforcement mechanisms, thereby supplying more concrete administrative and judicial implementation rules alongside the EU Regulation.

results.title: Introduction to Ireland's Implementation of the EU Artificial Intelligence Law
results.localTitle: 爱尔兰企业、旅游和就业部关于实施欧盟人工智能法的介绍
results.issuer: 企业、 旅游和就业部
results.summary: 该介绍文件阐释 Regulation (EU) 2024/1689（欧盟人工智能法） 的风险分级体系、义务主体及时间安排，并通过合规路径说明与国家监管安排介绍提供解释性和程序性补充，，而不改变欧盟法规的实体义务。
results.englishSummary: This overview document explains the risk classification system, stakeholder obligations, and timelines under Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 (Artificial Intelligence Act), and by outlining compliance pathways and national supervisory arrangements, it provides interpretative and procedural supplements without altering the substantive obligations of the EU Regulation.
results.topicLabel: 人工智能与新技术治理

results.title: Cybersäkerhetslag (2025:1506)
results.summary: 该法实施 Directive (EU) 2022/2555（NIS2 指令），明确关键与重要实体分类、风险管理义务、分阶段事件报告要求及主管机关监督和罚款权限，从而建立比指令文本更具体的国家监管与制裁体系。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements Directive (EU) 2022/2555 (NIS2 Directive) by specifying essential and important entity categories, phased incident reporting obligations, risk management duties and supervisory and fine powers of authorities, thereby establishing a more detailed national regulatory and sanctioning system than the Directive text itself.

results.title: Plaquette de présentation de la directive NIS 2
results.localTitle: NIS2介绍手册
results.issuer: 法国政府（Gouvernement）：法国国家信息系统安全局（ANSSI ）
results.summary: 因为法国具体转化NIS2指令的国内法尚在制定中，法国国家网络安全机构则发布NIS2介绍手册，聚焦于 NIS2（Network and Information Security Directive 2） 的理解与实施，以帮助组织理解 NIS2 的基本结构以及如何在国家层面准备合规计划。核心内容包括： 指令的适用主体：哪些实体属于 NIS2 的安全义务范围 安全义务框架：网络与信息系统安全风险管理要求 事件通报与报告机制：如何定义安全事件、通报流程与时间要求 供应链风险管理：第三方风险管理及关键依赖方安全要求 监督与执法机制：监管评估、检查、处罚可能性 国家级协调机制：执法机关、行业主管部门的职责划分
results.englishSummary: As France’s domestic legislation transposing the NIS2 Directive is still under preparation, the ANSSI has issued an introductory handbook on NIS2 (Network and Information Security Directive 2), focusing on the understanding and implementation of the Directive in order to assist organizations in preparing for compliance at national level. The core elements include: Scope of application: which entities fall within the scope of NIS2 security obligations; Security obligations framework: requirements relating to risk management for network and information systems; Incident notification and reporting mechanisms: how to define a security incident, as well as applicable reporting procedures and time limits; Supply chain risk management: security requirements concerning third-party risk management and critical dependencies; Supervision and enforcement mechanisms: regulatory assessments, inspections, and potential sanctions; National coordination mechanisms: allocation of responsibilities among enforcement authorities and sectoral competent authorities.

results.title: Act on the Federal Office for Information Security （new BSIG)
results.localTitle: 新联邦信息安全办公室法
results.referenceNo: BGBl. 2025 I Nr. 301, S. 2， 即该法于 2025 年 12 月 2 日发布于《联邦法律公报》第 I 部第 301 号，第 2 页。
results.issuer: 德国联邦议院（Deutscher Bundestag）和联邦参议院（Bundesrat）
results.summary: 德国新版《联邦信息安全办公室法》（BSIG）是德国信息安全监管的基本法律，确立并授权 联邦信息安全办公室（BSI） 作为国家级信息与网络安全主管机关，负责联邦行政 IT 系统安全、网络威胁监测预警、制定安全标准及协调响应。BSIG 规定了针对“特别重要设施”和“重要设施”的风险管理体制、报告义务与注册义务、管理层安全治理责任，以及对重大安全事件的上报期限与监督与处罚机制等具体义务，同时扩大了 BSIG 的监管覆盖范围，涵盖传统关键信息基础设施之外的多个经济领域。新版 BSIG 在操作性上比原版更详细、更强制，并与 NIS-2 的要求在企业安全管理、事件通报、高管责任和监管权力分配等方面形成紧密衔接，但法律本身并不是 NIS-2 指令本身，而是 NIS2UmsG 框架下的国家级实施法组成部分。
results.englishSummary: The German Act on the Federal Office for Information Security (BSI Act, BSIG) is the foundational national statute for cybersecurity in Germany, establishing and empowering the Federal Office for Information Security (BSI) as the federal authority responsible for IT and network security governance, threat monitoring and warning, security standard setting, and coordinated response. The law sets out specific obligations for “essential” and “important” entities, including risk management systems, incident reporting and registration duties, governance-level cybersecurity responsibilities, and supervisory and sanctioning powers, with broader scope and more concrete requirements than the previous BSIG. While BSIG itself is not the NIS-2 directive, the revised Act operationalises NIS-2 at the national level, tightly aligning Germany’s legal framework with EU cybersecurity standards and imposing clear compliance duties on both private and public sectors.

results.title: DECRETO LEGISLATIVO 3 agosto 2022, n. 123 Norme di adeguamento della normativa nazionale alle disposizioni del Titolo III «Quadro di certificazione della cibersicurezza» del regolamento (UE) 2019/881 del Parlamento europeo e del Consiglio del 17 aprile 2019 relativo all'ENISA, l'Agenzia dell'Unione europea per la cibersicurezza, e alla certificazione della cibersicurezza per le tecnologie dell'informazione e della comunicazione, e che abroga il regolamento (UE) n. 526/2013 («regolamento sulla cibersicurezza»)
results.localTitle: 2022年8月3日第123号立法法令 关于使国家立法适应欧洲议会和理事会 2019 年 4 月 17 日关于欧盟网络安全局 (ENISA) 和信息通信技术网络安全认证的 (EU) 2019/881 号条例第三章“网络安全认证框架”的规定，并废除 (EU) No 526/2013 号条例（“网络安全法”）的规则
results.summary: 该立法法令实施 Regulation (EU) 2019/881（Cybersecurity Act） 第三章网络安全认证框架，通过指定国家网络安全认证主管机关、明确市场监督与处罚权限、建立国家协调机制，使欧盟ICT网络安全认证制度在意大利具备具体监管执行基础，并强化了国家层面的执法与合规监督责任。
results.englishSummary: This Legislative Decree implements Title III of Regulation (EU) 2019/881 (Cybersecurity Act) on the European cybersecurity certification framework by designating the national cybersecurity certification authority, defining market surveillance and enforcement powers, and establishing coordination mechanisms at national level, thereby providing the institutional and enforcement structure necessary for the application of the EU ICT cybersecurity certification regime in Italy.

results.title: Codice in materia di protezione dei dati personali (Privacy Code)
results.localTitle: 意大利个人数据保护法典（DPA合并版）
results.summary: 意大利《个人数据保护法典》（Privacy Code）是意大利国家级数据保护基本法，首次由 2003 年 第 196 号立法法令颁布并于 2004 年起生效，后经 第 101 号 2018 年立法法令 修订以全面协调欧盟 GDPR（Regulation (EU) 2016/679） 在国内的适用。该法典在总体框架上与 GDPR 保持一致，并细化了数据处理的原则、合法性基础、数据主体权利、数据控制者及处理者义务、敏感数据处理条件、跨境数据流动、数据泄露通报义务以及行政/刑事责任等；与 GDPR 相比，法典包含更多具体条文细则，如对特殊类别数据的受限处理条件、特定行业（如通信电子隐私）的补充规定、具体的罚则与刑事责任以及在国内法允许范围内对数据处理合法基础和利益平衡的细化解释，使其在操作层面更具本地可执行性并填补 GDPR 某些领域留给成员国自由裁量的规则
results.englishSummary: The Italian Codice in materia di protezione dei dati personali (Personal Data Protection Code) is Italy’s national data protection statute, initially enacted as Legislative Decree No. 196 of 30 June 2003 and effective from 1 January 2004, and later substantially amended by Legislative Decree No. 101 of 10 August 2018 to align the Code with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR, Regulation (EU) 2016/679). The Code establishes comprehensive rules on personal data processing principles, lawful bases, data subject rights, obligations of data controllers and processors, special categories of data, data breach notification, cross-border transfers, and sanctions. While largely consistent with the GDPR framework, it includes additional detailed provisions — such as specific conditions for sensitive data processing, electronic communications privacy rules, domestic enforcement mechanisms, specific sanctions and criminal liability, and interpretative clarifications for lawful processing bases — making it more operationally specific within the Italian legal system and addressing certain areas where the GDPR allows Member State discretion.
results.topicLabel: 数据跨境传输与监管遵从

results.title: Vyhláška č. 408/2025 Sb. Vyhláška o regulovaných službách
results.localTitle: 第 408/2025 号法令-受监管服务法令
results.issuer: 国家网络和信息安全办公室
results.summary: 该法令依据第 264/2025 号法案（网络安全法）实施NIS2框架，明确哪些实体和服务属于受监管范围，并细化分类标准和登记义务，从而在欧盟指令基础上提供更具体的适用范围界定规则。
results.englishSummary: This Decree, based on the No. 264/2025 Act (Cybersecurity Act) implementing NIS2, specifies which entities and services fall within the regulated scope and details classification criteria and registration obligations, thereby providing more precise scope-determination rules than the EU Directive.

results.title: NIS-2-Umsetzungs- und Cybersicherheitsstärkungsgesetz (NIS2UmsG)
results.localTitle: 联邦实施 NIS2 的法律
results.referenceNo: BGBl. 2025 I Nr. 301, S. 2， 即该法于 2025 年 12 月 2 日发布于《联邦法律公报》第 I 部第 301 号，第 2 页。
results.issuer: 德国联邦议院（Deutscher Bundestag）和联邦参议院（Bundesrat）
results.summary: 《NIS-2-Umsetzungs- und Cybersicherheitsstärkungsgesetz》（NIS-2 Implementation and Cybersecurity Strengthening Act ，NIS2UmsG）是德国为将 欧盟 NIS-2 指令（EU Directive (EU) 2022/2555） 转化为本国法律而制定的实施与强化法，该法律通过修改现有法体系（尤其全面重写《联邦信息安全办公室法 BSIG》）将德国网络与信息安全法律现代化。法律明确规定了“特别重要实体”和“重要实体”等受规制组织类别，并要求这些实体建立 全面的网络安全风险管理、技术与组织措施、重大安全事件报告制度与注册义务；同时强化了 监管机构的监督权与处罚权力，扩大适用范围至更多行业和公司规模，并提高管理层在网络安全治理中的责任。法律在内容上超越 NIS-2 指令最低标准，通过更具体的监管义务和实施细则增强德国整体网络安全监管体系。
results.englishSummary: The NIS-2 Implementation and Cybersecurity Strengthening Act (NIS2UmsG) is Germany’s national law transposing the EU NIS-2 Directive (Directive (EU) 2022/2555) into domestic legislation. Enacted as BGBl. I 2025 No. 301 and effective 6 December 2025, it modernises the German cybersecurity legal framework by substantially amending existing laws, particularly through an overhaul of the Federal Office for Information Security Act (BSIG). The Act defines categories of “essential” and “important” entities subject to regulation, imposes comprehensive requirements for risk management, technical and organisational security measures, incident reporting and registration duties, and significantly strengthens supervisory and enforcement powers. It extends the scope of regulated entities and obliges management to oversee cybersecurity governance, thereby aligning Germany’s national regime with NIS-2 while providing more detailed and enforceable obligations.

results.title: Infoühiskonna teenuse seadus
results.localTitle: 信息社会服务法
results.summary: 该法实施欧盟《数字服务法》（Regulation (EU) 2022/2065）等在线服务相关条例，界定电子服务提供者的义务、通知义务和监管制度，并结合国家层面规定了与欧盟《数字服务法》（DSA）和相关在线中介法规的合规要求及处罚措施。 更具操作性补充： 在国法律中明确平台责任义务的违规罚款、履责要求、国家监管机构职责范围（如消费者保护与技术监管局）
results.englishSummary: This law implements the EU Digital Services Act (Regulation (EU) 2022/2065) and other online service-related regulations, defining the obligations, notification obligations, and regulatory systems of e-service providers. It also incorporates national-level provisions regarding compliance requirements and penalties under the EU Digital Services Act (DSA) and related online intermediary regulations. Further operational supplements include: clearly defining platform responsibilities and obligations, penalties for violations, performance requirements, and the scope of responsibilities of national regulatory agencies (such as consumer protection and technology regulatory authorities) within national laws.

results.title: EDPB Guidelines 2/2018 on derogations of Article 49 under Regulation 2016/679
results.localTitle: EDPB《关于 GDPR 第49条例外情形的指南》
results.issuer: 欧洲数据保护委员会（European Data Protection Board, EDPB）
results.summary: 指南解释第49条允许在缺乏充分保护或适当保障措施情况下的 有限例外。 强调应优先考虑第45条或第46条机制（充分性决定/保障措施），再考虑例外。 提供常见例外情形（明确同意、履行合同、重大公共利益等）及合规前提条件。
results.englishSummary: Guidelines： Clarifies the derogations (exceptions) under Article 49 GDPR, which permit data transfers to third countries/groups where Chapter V safeguards (adequacy, appropriate safeguards) are absent. Emphasises that derogations are narrow and exceptional, and controllers should first seek adequacy decisions or appropriate safeguards under Articles 45/46 before relying on Article 49. Examples include explicit consent, contract necessity, public interest, legal claims, vital interests of data subjects, etc.

results.title: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 of the European Parliament and of the Council (Artificial Intelligence Act)(AI Act)
results.localTitle: 《人工智能法案》
results.issuer: 欧洲议会与欧盟理事会/European Parliament and the Council of the European Union
results.summary: 《人工智能法案》（AI Act）是欧盟针对人工智能系统的统一监管框架，适用于在欧盟市场投放、使用或影响欧盟用户的AI系统。法案根据风险等级对AI应用进行分类管理，明确禁止对人类安全与权利构成不可接受风险的AI应用（如社会评分），并对高风险AI系统（如关键基础设施、教育、就业）设立严格的事前合格评估、风险管理及透明度义务。此外，法案对通用人工智能模型（特别是具有系统风险者）设定了专门要求，包括模型评估、事件报告及网络安全保障。其核心机制是建立欧盟层面的市场监督与执法体系，并规定高额罚款。该法案旨在确保AI技术的安全、可信与合规发展，在促进创新的同时保护欧盟公民的基本权利与价值观。
results.englishSummary: The Artificial Intelligence Act (AI Act) is the EU's harmonized regulatory framework for artificial intelligence systems, applying to AI systems placed on the market, put into service, or affecting users within the EU. The Act categorizes and regulates AI applications based on their risk level, explicitly prohibiting AI practices posing unacceptable risks to human safety and fundamental rights (e.g., social scoring). It imposes stringent ex-ante conformity assessments, risk management, and transparency obligations for high-risk AI systems (e.g., those used in critical infrastructure, education, or employment). Furthermore, it sets specific requirements for general-purpose AI models, particularly those with systemic risks, including model evaluation, incident reporting, and cybersecurity safeguards. Its core mechanisms involve establishing an EU-level market surveillance and enforcement system with provisions for substantial fines. The Act aims to ensure the safe, trustworthy, and lawful development of AI technology, fostering innovation while protecting the fundamental rights and values of EU citizens.
results.topicLabel: 人工智能与新技术治理

results.title: S.I. No. 272/2024 - European Union (European Data Governance Act) Regulations 2024
results.localTitle: 第272/2024号法令——2024年欧盟（欧洲数据治理法）条例
results.summary: 该条例实施 Regulation (EU) 2022/868，指定国家主管机关并规定登记程序、监督权及行政罚款机制，使欧盟数据治理义务在爱尔兰具有可执行性。
results.englishSummary: This law implements Regulation (EU) 2022/868 (Data Governance Act) by designating the national competent authority and establishing registration procedures, supervisory powers, and administrative fines, thereby rendering the EU data governance obligations enforceable in Ireland.

results.title: Wet van 26 april 2024 tot vaststelling van een kader voor de cyberbeveiliging van netwerk- en informatiesystemen van algemeen belang voor de openbare veiligheid
results.localTitle: 2024年4月26日建立公共安全相关网络和信息系统网络安全框架的法律
results.summary: 比利时 《2024 年 4 月 26 日建立公共安全相关网络和信息系统网络安全框架的法律》 是为将 欧盟 NIS2 指令（Directive (EU) 2022/2555） 纳入国内法律体系而制定的国家级网络安全法。该法律取代了 2019 年的 NIS1 法律，构建了针对所有“公共安全相关网络和信息系统”的网络安全监管框架，明确规定各类被认定为“重要或关键实体”的组织须实施适当、相称的技术、运营与组织性网络安全风险管理措施，以提高其对网络风险和网络事件的防御与应对能力；规定了重大网络安全事件报告义务、主管监管机构职责、监督和制裁机制；并对比利时国家战略下的公共网络安全政策协调和政府间合作机制提供法律基础。该法律适用范围广泛，涵盖能源、交通、金融、健康、数字基础设施等关键服务部门，旨在提高比利时整体网络安全韧性与社会经济活动连续性。
results.englishSummary: The Law of 26 April 2024 establishing a framework for the cybersecurity of networks and information systems of general interest for public security is Belgian national legislation enacted to transpose the EU NIS2 Directive (Directive (EU) 2022/2555) into domestic law. It replaces the previous 2019 framework and establishes a comprehensive legal basis for the cybersecurity of networks and information systems that are crucial for public security and economic continuity. The Law requires entities classified as “essential” or “important” to adopt appropriate, proportionate technical, operational, and organisational cybersecurity risk-management measures, strengthens incident reporting and supervision obligations, and provides for enforcement and sanctions mechanisms by designated supervisory authorities. It also enhances coordination of public cybersecurity policy across sectors such as energy, transport, finance, health, and digital infrastructure.

results.title: Krajowy System Cyberbezpieczeństwa/Act on the National Cybersecurity System
results.localTitle: 国家网络安全系统法（2025年12月29日合并文本）
results.summary: 该法实施欧盟2016/1148 号指令（NIS指令），即关于在欧盟境内实现网络与信息系统高水平的共同安全措施的指令，界定关键与重要实体类别、建立国家级CSIRT体系及强制事件报告时限，并在部分领域设定更具体的组织性和技术性安全措施及国家监督权力，从而比指令文本提供更具操作性的国家网络安全合规框架。
results.englishSummary: This Act implements EU Directive 2016/1148 (the NIS Directive) on measures for a high common level of security of network and information systems within the Union. It defines the categories of essential and important entities, establishes a national CSIRT framework and mandatory incident reporting timeframes, and sets out more detailed organisational and technical security measures as well as national supervisory powers in certain sectors, thereby providing a more operational national cybersecurity compliance framework than the Directive itself.

results.title: Guidelines on Data Protection Officers (WP243 rev.01)
results.localTitle: 《数据保护官（DPO）指南》
results.issuer: WP29（GDPR 实施前的 Article 29 工作组），现由 EDPB 承袭及认可
results.summary: 指南解释 何种组织必须设立 DPO（如公共机构、核心业务涉及大规模处理/监控或敏感数据）。 明确 DPO 任职资格、独立性、资源保障 等要求。 列举 DPO 的基本任务：合规建议、DPIA 咨询、监督执行、与监管机构协作、数据主体沟通等
results.englishSummary: Guidelines： Provides detailed guidance on designation, position, and tasks of Data Protection Officers under Articles 37–39 GDPR, including: When DPOs must be appointed (public authority, large‑scale monitoring, large‑scale processing of special data); Required qualifications and independence; Tasks such as advising controllers/processors, monitoring compliance, DPIA input, cooperation with authorities, contact point for data subjects.

results.title: Küberturvalisuse seadus
results.localTitle: 网络安全法
results.summary: 爱沙尼亚《网络安全法》转化实施 Directive (EU) 2022/2555（NIS2 指令），通过明确“重要服务”与“关键实体”范围、强制性风险管理措施、分阶段事件通报时限以及国家信息系统管理局（RIA）的监督与处罚权限，建立了较欧盟指令更具体且具有技术操作性的国家网络安全合规与审查机制。
results.englishSummary: The Estonian Cybersecurity Act transposes Directive (EU) 2022/2555 (NIS2 Directive) by defining the scope of essential services and critical entities, imposing mandatory risk-management measures and phased incident reporting deadlines, and granting the Information System Authority (RIA) supervisory and sanctioning powers, thereby establishing a more detailed and technically operational national cybersecurity compliance and audit regime than the EU Directive.

results.title: Data (Use and Access) Act 2025 - new data protection complaints requirements
results.localTitle: 英国 DUAA 数据保护投诉处理义务
results.referenceNo: Data (Use and Access) Act 2025; DPA 2018 Section 164A
results.summary: 英国 ICO 提醒组织须在 2026 年 6 月 19 日前建立数据保护投诉处理流程，以满足《Data (Use and Access) Act 2025》引入的新要求。该要求影响数据主体投诉入口、响应时限、升级路径和留痕机制。
results.englishSummary: The ICO reminds organisations that from 19 June 2026 they must have procedures in place for handling data protection complaints under the Data (Use and Access) Act 2025. The change affects complaint intake, response timeframes, escalation paths and record-keeping.

results.title: Guidelines 1/2026 on processing of personal data for scientific research purposes
results.localTitle: EDPB 科学研究个人数据处理指南 1/2026
results.summary: EDPB Guidelines 1/2026 聚焦科学研究目的下个人数据处理，围绕 GDPR 合法基础、特殊类别数据、数据主体权利和研究场景保障措施征求意见，反馈截止日期为 2026 年 6 月 25 日。
results.englishSummary: EDPB Guidelines 1/2026 address processing of personal data for scientific research purposes, including GDPR lawful bases, special categories of data, data subject rights and safeguards in research contexts. Comments are invited until 25 June 2026.

results.title: Targeted consultation on draft guidelines for the classification of high-risk AI systems
results.localTitle: 欧委会高风险 AI 系统分类指南征询
results.referenceNo: AI Act Art. 6; Annex I; Annex III; consultation deadline 23 July 2026
results.summary: 欧委会就 AI Act 高风险 AI 系统分类指南征询意见，旨在帮助提供者和部署者判断系统是否落入高风险类别及对应义务。征询原定 2026 年 6 月 23 日截止，现已延长至 2026 年 7 月 23 日。
results.englishSummary: The European Commission is consulting on draft guidelines for classifying high-risk AI systems under the AI Act, helping providers and deployers assess whether systems fall into high-risk categories and related obligations. The consultation deadline has been extended to 23 July 2026.
results.topicLabel: 人工智能与新技术治理

results.title: Code of Practice on Transparency of AI-Generated Content
results.localTitle: 欧盟 AI 生成内容透明度实践守则
results.summary: 欧盟 AI 生成内容透明度实践守则于 2026 年 6 月 10 日发布，支持 AI Act 第 50 条关于 AI 生成或操纵内容标记、检测和深度伪造标签的透明度义务；相关法定义务自 2026 年 8 月 2 日起适用。
results.englishSummary: The Code of Practice on Transparency of AI-Generated Content, published on 10 June 2026, supports compliance with Article 50 AI Act transparency obligations on marking, detecting and labelling AI-generated or manipulated content and deepfakes. The legal obligations apply from 2 August 2026.
results.topicLabel: 人工智能与新技术治理

results.title: Template for personal data breach notification
results.localTitle: EDPB 个人数据泄露通知模板
results.referenceNo: GDPR Art. 33; GDPR Art. 34; consultation deadline 5 August 2026
results.summary: EDPB 发布个人数据泄露通知模板并征求意见，面向监管机构 IT 工具实施，纳入通知字段、预设值和提示语，以提升 GDPR 第 33 条和第 34 条泄露通报的一致性。反馈截止日期为 2026 年 8 月 5 日。
results.englishSummary: The EDPB published a template for personal data breach notification for consultation. The template supports implementation in supervisory authorities' IT tools and structures notification fields, predefined values and prompts for GDPR Articles 33 and 34. Comments are due by 5 August 2026.

results.title: Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China
results.localTitle: 中华人民共和国个人信息保护法
results.issuer: Standing Committee of the National People's Congress
results.summary: 《个人信息保护法》规定个人信息处理原则、告知同意、敏感个人信息、自动化决策、个人信息出境、个人信息保护影响评估和处理者义务，是中国个人信息保护的基础性法律。
results.englishSummary: China's Personal Information Protection Law sets rules for personal information processing, notice and consent, sensitive personal information, automated decision-making, cross-border transfers, personal information protection impact assessments and processor obligations.

results.title: California Consumer Privacy Act / California Privacy Rights Act provisions
results.localTitle: 加州 CCPA/CPRA 消费者隐私权规则
results.summary: 加州消费者隐私规则规定企业告知、访问、更正、删除、选择退出出售或共享个人信息、限制使用敏感个人信息以及消费者请求响应机制，是美国州级隐私合规的重要框架。
results.englishSummary: The California Consumer Privacy Act, as amended by the California Privacy Rights Act, establishes notice, access, correction, deletion, opt-out of sale or sharing, sensitive personal information limits and consumer request response mechanisms.
